name: Provvista Sugo Classica Pasta Sauce
description: FIVE BROTHERS PROVVISTA SUGO CLASSICA PASSATA SAUCE 700G
long_description:
Experience the time-honoured taste of Italy with Five Brothers Provvista Sugo Classica Traditional Cooking Sauce 700g. Expertly crafted to capture the essence of classic Italian cooking, this sauce blends vine-ripened tomatoes, aromatic herbs, and premium ingredients into a rich, flavourful masterpiece.

- Authentic Italian taste - a traditional sauce that brings genuine, rustic flavour to your dishes
- Versatile and convenient - perfect for transforming pasta, pizza, or any Italian-inspired meal
- Made with care - slow-cooked to develop a deep, satisfying taste that honours generations of culinary heritage

Elevate your home cooking with Five Brothers Provvista Sugo Classica Traditional Cooking Sauce 700g - your gateway to restaurant-quality Italian flavours in every spoonful.
ingredients: Tomatoes (82%) (crushed, diced, reconstituted), tomato paste (15%), onion, salt, brown sugar, food acid (citric).
country_of_origin: Made in Australia from at least 60% Australian ingredients

name: Sugo Speciale Grilled Vegetables
long_description:
Rich and Savoury

The sweet and vibrant baby roma tomato is paired with diced grilled vegetables, then seasoned with red onion of tropea for a rustic sauce with a rich, smoky flavour. 

Mutti Sugo Speciale combines the fresh taste of 100% Italian tomatoes with the finest ingredients sourced from regions of excellence. Mutti Sugo Speciale has no added sugar or preservatives.
ingredients: Tomato Pulp (57.2%), Baby Roma Tomato Puree (20%), Tomato Paste (5%), Grilled Eggplant (5%), Grilled Cipolla Rossa Di Tropea Calabria I.G.P. Red Onion (5%), Grilled Yellow Capsicum (4%), Olive Oil, Flavourings, Salt, Oregano, Garlic, Black Pepper.

name: Verdure Mediterranee Pasta Sauce
long_description:
Barilla Verdure Mediterranean (Grilled Vegetables) is a rich slow-cooked pasta sauce made with natural ingredients, including 100% Italian field-grown tomatoes, Mediterranean vegetables, eggplant, and capsicum.
This well-loved classic is a true Mediterranean sauce and is the perfect partner for any Barilla pasta. Paired well with both Barilla Classic Pasta or Al Bronzo Pasta, this pasta sauce is as versatile as it is delicious.
Try this everyday, traditional Italian pasta sauce with any cut you choose, including spaghetti, penne and fusilli, for a delicious and quick pasta dinner idea the whole family will love.
Crafted using quality ingredients, Barilla Verdure Mediterranean sauce with Italian tomatoes is the perfect pasta sauce to bring you and your loved ones together.
Suitable for vegetarians, this Barilla sauce has no added preservatives and is gluten-free.
SO THICK & RICH, YOU DON'T NEED TO ADD A THING!
At Barilla, we are passionate about pasta and have shared our passion with the world since 1877. We strive to make Barilla sauce and pasta that are good for you and the planet. Barilla. A sign of love.
  • GMO- Free

  • Free of artificial colours and flavours, sweeteners and preservatives

  • Gluten, Lactose and Fat Free

  • Vegan
ingredients: Tomato pulp 50%, tomato concentrate 12%, grilled vegetables 7.8%, (eggplant 4.8%, yellow capsicum 3%), zucchini, 7.8%, carrots 6%, water, onion 4.6%, sunflower, oil, salt, sugar, oregano 0.35%, black pepper.

name: Basil With Rocket Pesto
long_description:
Barilla Rocket Pesto is a fragrant, vibrant combination of Italian herbs that will excite your palate with the sweetness of Italian basil and the peppery zing of rocket.
Add this green pesto to your favourite pasta shape or cut-it's perfect with al dente Linguine or Spaghetti No.5-or add to any dish for an exquisite peppery touch.
Stir Barilla Pesto ready-made sauce over your favourite cooked pasta.
Whether you've just got home from the gym and need a quick, healthy meal or want to impress your loved ones, our gluten-free pasta sauce helps you bring authentic Italian food to your dinner table.
We have various pestos to suit everyone's tastes: Barilla Pesto alla Genovese, Barilla Pesto Rustico and more. Pair with grilled chicken or pasta, or spread onto pizza, and make tonight Italian night with Barilla pesto sauce. The taste everyone loves. At Barilla, we are passionate about pasta and have been sharing our passion with the world since 1877 when the first pasta shapes were made by hand using simple tools. We strive to make Barilla sauce and pasta that are good for you and the planet.
  • Our 100% Italian sweet basil pesto is cultivated through sustainable practice

  • GMO- Free

  • No added artificial colours, and sweeteners

  • Gluten Free

  • Trans fat free.
ingredients: PESTO SAUCE WITH BASIL, PARSLEY AND ROCKET. vegetable oils (olive, sunflower), basil 20.7%, parsley 11.7%, Pecorino Romano cheese (sheep's milk), glucose syrup, cashews, whey powder (milk), rocket salad 2.5%, ricotta cheese (milk), salt, sugar, acidity regulators (lactic and citric acid), buttermilk powder (milk), thyme, natural flavourings (milk), garlic.
allergens:
Contains Cashew, Milk
May Contain Almond, Pistachio, Walnut
Free From Gluten

name: Genovese Basil Pesto
long_description:
Monini represents a legacy of Italian craftsmanship and excellence in the olive oil world. For three generations, Monini have passed down the unique expertise of selecting the finest extra virgin olive oils from father to son. With passion, dedication, and a daily commitment to quality, Monini has now crafted a premium range of Pestos featuring a base of their exceptional Olive Oil. Simple, authentic ingredients, combined with traditional recipes, bring the essence of Italian flavor to your kitchen, allowing you to create rich, aromatic, and flavorful dishes inspired by Italy.

The classic Basil Pesto Genovese is made in Liguria from premium quality ingredients and has a deep, savoury, authentic taste and aroma. It's herbaceous authentic recipe contains superior levels of Italian basil and Olive Oil which are brought together by Italian cheeses and garlic. Gluten Free. No artificial colours or flavours.

For a quick yet indulgent mid-week meal stir through your favourite cooked pasta, or use it as a way to add extra flavour, elevating your sandwich as a spread, or pair with meat and vegetables. Also available in Vegan Basil Pesto and Tomato Pesto.

Monini. The Unmistakable Taste of Italy.
ingredients: Basil 43%, olive oil 37%, potatoes flakes, salt, water, Grana Padano PDO cheese 2.5% (milk, salt, rennet, contain Lysozyme from egg) cashew, sugar, Pecorino Romano PDO cheese 0.8% (ewe's milk, salt, rennet), acidity regulator: Glucono delta-lactone, garlic, antioxidant: Ascorbic Acid.
allergens:
Contains Cashew, Egg, Milk
May Contain Peanut

name: Passata Di Puglia
long_description:
I am a special passata because I am made with long tomatoes that are ripened under the Puglian sun. Harvested by our own farmers, and immediately processed by expert hands only in the months of August and September, the best months to be bottled. Sweet and tasty, they admire me because I turn every dish into a delicious recipe.

The love for the tomato motivates Rosso Gargano to follow it from sowing to harvest, with great care and a strong belief in keeping all its properties intact. 100% Puglian, Italian tomatoes, selected by hand, processed to a minimum, and reaching your table as if they have just been picked, with all the flavours of the land. Most importantly, "Grown by us".
ingredients: tomato, salt, acidity regulator- citric acid.

name: Pasta Sauce Ricotta And Pomodoro
description: BARILLA PASTA SAUCE RICOTTA AND POMODORO 400G
long_description:
Barilla's Meditteranean Olives rich Italian sauce, is made with a mouth-watering combination of green and black olives, capers, Italian tomatoes and onions.
A thick pasta sauce with a deliciously rich and full-bodied flavour, simply heat and serve with your favourite pasta or use as a base for other dishes.
Paired well with both sophisticated and simple pasta cuts, try this fragrant, everyday Italian pasta sauce with any cut of your choice, including spaghetti, penne and fusilli.
A perfect everyday Mediterranean sauce, it's great for a delicious and quick pasta dinner idea the whole family will love.
At Barilla, we are passionate about pasta and have been sharing our passion with the world since 1877. We strive to make Barilla sauce and pasta that are good for you and for the planet - 99.6% of our packaging is designed to be recycled. Barilla. A sign of love.
  • Made with 100% natural, Italian sun-grown tomatoes and ricotta

  • Suitable for vegetarians

  • Gluten free

  • No added preservatives

  • Slowly simmered for a rich taste with a thick texture
ingredients: chopped tomato 63%, tomato concentrate 12%, olives 10% (green olives 5%, black olives 5%), water, onion, sunflower oil, capers, sugar, natural flavouring, salt, parsley 3.5%, garlic, oregano 0.6%.

name: Thick & Chunky Rustic Passata
long_description:
Bring the authentic taste of homemade tomato sauce to your kitchen with Leggo's Rustic Passata. Crafted from the finest, Australian tomatoes, this chunky-textured passata is a must-have pantry essential. It offers a rich, natural flavour that adds depth to a wide variety of recipes.

Whether you're preparing casseroles, slow-cooked dishes, traybakes, pasta sauces, soups, or any other favourite meal, Leggo's Rustic Passata is the perfect base for creating delicious, hearty dishes your family will love. Its versatility makes it easy to incorporate into both classic and innovative recipes, and with no artificial colours, flavours, or added preservatives, you can feel confident about what you're serving.

When it comes to Italian food, Aussies love to do it their way - Leggo's are here to celebrate Aussie twists on classic Italian recipes! Leggo's has been Australian made with quality ingredients for over 130 years - It's How We Do Italian.

- Made in Australia with Australian grown tomatoes
- No Artificial colours or flavours
- No added preservatives
- 4.5 Health Star Rating
- Halal Certified

When it comes to Italian food, Aussies love to do it their way - Leggo's are here to celebrate Aussie twists on classic Italian recipes! Leggo's has been Australian made with quality ingredients for over 130 years - It's How We Do Italian.

name: Basil Pesto With Chilli Pasta Sauce
description: BARILLA BASIL PESTO WITH CHILLI PASTA SAUCE 195G
long_description:
Italian basil meets spicy chilli in our Barilla pesto sauce with basil and chilli - a thrilling way to spice up pasta dishes, vegetarian meals and bruschetta. Use this quick pasta sauce as a marinade to give meat dishes a spicy edge that will satisfy any chilli lover.
Add Barilla Pesto ready-made sauce to your favourite dishes to pump up the flavour and make a meal to be proud of. Whether you've just got home from the gym and need a quick, healthy meal or want to impress your loved ones, our gluten-free pasta sauce helps you bring authentic Italian food to your dinner table.
We have a variety of different pestos to suit everyone's tastes: Barilla Pesto alla Genovese, Barilla Vegan Pesto and more. Pair with grilled chicken or pasta, or spread onto pizza, and make tonight Italian night with Barilla pesto sauce. The taste everyone loves. At Barilla, we are passionate about pasta and have been sharing our passion with the world since 1877 when the first pasta shapes were made by hand using simple tools. We strive to make Barilla sauce and pasta that are good for you and the planet.
  • Our 100% Italian sweet basil pesto is cultivated through sustainable practice

  • GMO- Free

  • No added sugars, artificial colours, and sweeteners

  • Gluten Free

  • Trans fat free.

With no added sugar or preservatives, this sauce is perfect as a base or stirred through hot pasta as a simple pasta sauce.

We combine just picked Italian tomatoes with select ingredients, slow cooked to bring you a delicious and authentic range of pasta sauces.

Mutti has been dedicated to producing high quality tomato products used and loved in kitchens all around the world since 1899.

name: Grilled Vegetable
long_description:
Cucina Matese Grilled Vegetable Pasta Sauce 550g.
  • Classic Italian pasta sauce
  • Made in Italy
  • No artificial colours and flavours
This classic Cucina Matese Grilled Vegetable Pasta Sauce is made in Italy using time-honoured techniques and the highest quality ingredients. Created with a combination of authentic Mediterranean vegetables including sun-ripened tomatoes, zucchinis, and red and yellow capsicums, it's full of rich flavours and perfect for all types of pasta dishes. Simply heat and stir through. Use it with all types of meat, veges and seafood. Or create a meat-free meal that's satisfying and full of flavour with Cucina Matese Grilled Vegetable Pasta Sauce over spinach and ricotta ravioli, topped with a generous handful of fresh basil leaves. Cucina Matese Grilled Vegetable Pasta Sauce pairs well with all pasta shapes, especially short varieties like rigatoni, ditali, or penne. Add in some capers, anchovies and buttery green olives for a simple yet memorable dish that's perfect for any night of the week and best served with crusty bread and a glass of something chilled.
ingredients: INGREDIENTS: Tomato (83%) (Pulp, Purée, Juice), Grilled Vegetables (12%) (Capsicum, Zucchini), Onion, Basil, Thickener (1442), Salt, Sunflower Seed Oil, Acidity Regulator (Lactic Acid), Black Pepper.INGREDIENTI: Pomodoro (83%) (Polpa, Passata, Succo), Verdure Grigliate (12%) (Peperoni, Zucchini), Cipolla, Basilico, Addensante (1442), Sale, Olio di Semi di Girasole, Correttore di Acidit  (Acido Lattico), Pepe Nero.

name: Norma Pasta Sauce
long_description:
Cucina Matese Norma Pasta Sauce 550g.
  • Classic Italian pasta sauce
  • Made in Italy
  • No artificial colours and flavours
This classic Cucina Matese Norma Pasta Sauce is made in Italy using time-honoured techniques and the highest quality ingredients. With fresh vine-ripened tomatoes, eggplant and ricotta cheese, it's a delicious sauce that pairs well with a variety of pasta. Simply heat and stir through. Cucina Matese Norma Pasta Sauce is great with all types of meat, veges and seafood dishes. To create a vegetarian meal that's satisfying and full of flavour, roast thick slices of eggplant in a little olive oil until golden then gently stir into warmed Cucina Matese Norma Pasta Sauce with fresh basil and seasonings like dried oregano or thyme. Then add your cooked pasta to the sauce with a splash of the reserved pasta cooking water. Gently stir in some cheese, parmesan or mozzarella work well, and top with a generous handful of fresh basil leaves before serving. Simple yet delicious, best enjoyed with crusty bread and a glass of something chilled.
ingredients: INGREDIENTS:Tomato (86%) (Pulp, Purée, Juice), Eggplant (4.5%), Salted Ricotta Cheese (3.5%) [Whey (Milk), Salt], Onion, Thickener (1442), Basil, Pecorino Romano PDO Cheese (Milk, Salt, Rennet*), Sunflower Seed Oil, Salt, Natural Flavourings, Acidity Regulator (Lactic Acid), Black Pepper. *Animal Derived.INGREDIENTI: Pomodoro (86%) (Polpa, Passata, Succo), Melanzane (4,5%), Ricotta Salata (3.5%) (Siero di Latte, Sale), Cipolla, Addensante (1442), Basilico, Pecorino Romano DOP (Latte, Sale, Caglio*), Olio di Semi di Girasole, Sale, Aromi Naturali, Correttore di Acidit  (Acido Lattico), Pepe Nero. *Di Origine Animale.

name: Genovese Basil Pesto
long_description:
Monini represents a legacy of Italian craftsmanship and excellence in the olive oil world. For three generations, Monini have passed down the unique expertise of selecting the finest extra virgin olive oils from father to son. With passion, dedication, and a daily commitment to quality, Monini has now crafted a premium range of Pestos featuring a base of their quality Olive Oil. Simple, authentic ingredients, combined with traditional recipes, bring the essence of Italian flavor to your kitchen, allowing you to create rich, aromatic, and flavorful dishes inspired by Italy.

The Vegan Pesto Genovese is made in Liguria from premium quality ingredients and has a deep, savoury, authentic taste and aroma. Created with vegans in mind, this herbaceous, nutty premium recipe is made with no animal ingredients and contains superior levels of Italian basil, Olive Oil, cashew and pine nuts. Gluten Free. No artificial colours or flavours.

For a quick yet indulgent mid-week meal stir through your favourite cooked pasta, or use it as a way to add extra flavour, elevating your sandwich as a spread, or pair with meat and vegetables. Also available in Basil Pesto and Tomato Pesto.

Monini. The Unmistakable Taste of Italy.
ingredients: Basil 37.9%, Olive Oil 37.2%, Potato, cashew, salt, pine nuts, acidity regulator: Lactic acid, antioxidant: Asorbic Acid.
allergens:
Contains Cashew, Pine Nut
May Contain Peanut

name: Stir Through Sauce Tomato Garlic Onion
description: LEGGOS STIR THROUGH SAUCE TOMATO GARLIC ONION
long_description:
Bursting with rich tomato flavour, slow-roasted garlic and sweet caramelised onions, Leggos Tomato Roasted Garlic and Caramelised Onion Stir Through Sauce delivers a deep, mellow aroma that beautifully complements the tangy sweetness of the tomatoes, expertly crafted to elevate your culinary creations.
Simply pour over and stir through cooked pasta, this sauce creates a quick and satisfying Italian-style meal in minutes. You can also use it as a flavour boost in your homemade marinara, baked dishes, or even as a dipping sauce for crusty bread.
Made in Australia with no artificial colours or preservatives. Packed with rich flavours, this 350g jar is your shortcut to a rustic and robust meal.

- No artificial colours or flavours
- No added preservatives
- Halal Certified
- Suitable for vegans and vegetarians
- Dinner ready in minutes - Simply stir contents of jar through pasta and serve

When it comes to Italian food, Aussies love to do it their way - Leggo's are here to celebrate Aussie twists on classic Italian recipes! Leggo's has been Australian made with quality ingredients for over 130 years - It's How We Do Italian.

Say goodbye to watery and bland passatas with Leggo's Gourmet Passata, made from 99.5% vine-ripened Australian tomatoes for a rich, smooth texture full of tomato goodness.

Perfect for a wide range of cuisines, this versatile passata enhances your dishes with its deep, authentic flavour. Blended with just a pinch of salt, it's a value-for-money option that brings quality and taste to your kitchen. Leggo's Gourmet range is designed to help you create restaurant-quality meals at home, combining the finest Australian-grown tomatoes with Leggo's decades of expertise in tomato-based products. Whether you're making pasta sauces, soups, or casseroles, Leggo's Gourmet Passata is the perfect base to elevate your recipes, offering both convenience and a taste difference you can truly savour. name: Gourmet Tomato Pasta Sauce Australian Pepperjack Shiraz
description: LEGGOS GOURMET PASTA SAUCE AUSTRALIAN TOMATO PEPPERJACK SHIRAZ 390G
long_description:
ADD DEPTH & RICHNESS TO YOUR DISH WITH THIS SAUCE. Red wine pairs beautifully with red meat such as beef, making this sauce perfect for slow-cooked meals, the classic spag bol, ragu and more!


Leggo's blends succulent tomatoes with vibrant herbs and bold Pepperjack Shiraz from the Barossa Valley for the finest quality pasta sauce.


- Made with Pepperjack Barossa Shiraz

- No Artificial Colours or Flavours

- 100% Australian Grown Tomatoes


RECIPE SUGGESTIONS

Swap canned tomatoes for our Shiraz pasta sauce in a ragu, spaghetti bolognese or your favourite slow cooked meat recipe for extra flavour.


WHAT MAKES LEGGO'S GOURMET RANGE SPECIAL?

Leggo's Gourmet Pasta Sauces are top-quality pasta sauces to make weeknight meals more delicious. We combine iconic ingredients to make your next pasta night oh-so-good. Try it and taste the difference!
ingredients: Tomatoes (79%) (crushed, diced, puree from paste), canola oil, caramelised onion (onion, canola oil, sugar), Australian Shiraz Red Wine (5%) (grapes, preservatives (220, 224), processing aids (egg, milk)), tapioca flour, salt, herbs (bay leaf, parsley), food acid (lactic), white pepper.
allergens:
Contains Egg, Milk
May Contain Almond, Cashew, Soy

name: Regular Tomato Paste 2 Pack
long_description:
Leggo's rich and smooth tomato paste is perfect for homemade pizzas, spaghetti bolognese, soups, casseroles, curries or any of your favourite family recipes. Conveniently sized in two single use 140g tubs, its versatile and easy to use and store in the pantry. Proudly made in Echuca, Victoria, using only the finest quality Australian tomatoes, Leggo's has been passionate about enriching Aussie recipes with the highest quality tomatoes since 1882. Leggo's tomato paste has a 4.5 Health Star Rating, no artificial colours or flavours and has no added preservatives. It's also Halal certified and suitable for vegans or vegetarians.

- Made in Australia using Australian grown tomatoes
- Triple concentrate for richer flavour
- No artificial colours or flavours
- No added preservatives
- 4.5 Health Star Rating
- Halal certified

- Try adding to any of your favourite family recipes for a richer tomato flavour

name: Roasted Vegetables Stir Through Sauce
description: LEGGOS STIR THROUGH SAUCE:ROASTED VEGETABLES:.:350 GRAM
long_description:
Full of rich, earthy flavour, Leggo's Stir Through Roasted Vegetable sauce brings together ripe tomatoes, zucchini, eggplant, and capsicum in a deliciously hearty blend.

Slow-roasted vegetables create a naturally sweet and savoury base that pairs beautifully with any pasta. Simply stir it through hot pasta and serve for a quick, wholesome meal-or use it to enrich soups, bakes, or other sauces with its deep, comforting taste. With no artificial colours or preservatives, it's a flavourful and fuss-free way to bring roasted goodness to your weeknight dinners. Made for those who love vegetables with bold Mediterranean flair in every bite.

- No artificial colours or flavours
- No added preservatives
- Halal Certified
- Suitable for vegans and vegetarians
- Dinner ready in minutes - Simply stir contents of jar through pasta and serve

When it comes to Italian food, Aussies love to do it their way - Leggo's are here to celebrate Aussie twists on classic Italian recipes! Leggo's has been Australian made with quality ingredients for over 130 years - It's How We Do Italian.

name: Napoletana Pasta Sauce
long_description:
Barilla Napoletana Sauce is a rich pasta sauce made with natural ingredients and a sweet and mild balance of 100% Italian field-grown tomatoes, onion and fresh aromatic herbs. Slowly simmered for a rich taste with a thick texture, this tasty pasta sauce is the perfect partner for just about any Barilla pasta.
Paired well with both sophisticated and simple pasta cuts, try this fragrant, everyday Italian pasta sauce with any cut of your choice, including spaghetti, penne and fusilli. A perfect everyday Mediterranean sauce, it's great for a delicious and quick pasta dinner idea the whole family will love.
Crafted using quality ingredients, Barilla Napoletana sauce with Italian tomatoes is the perfect pasta sauce to bring you and your loved ones together.
Suitable for vegetarians and vegans, this Barilla sauce has no added preservatives and is gluten free.
At Barilla, we are passionate about pasta and have been sharing our passion with the world since 1877. We strive to make Barilla sauce and pasta that are good for you and for the planet - 99.6% of our packaging is designed to be recycled.
Barilla. A sign of love.

  • GMO- Free

  • Free of artificial colours, sweeteners and preservatives

  • Gluten, Lactose and Fat Free

  • Vegan

  • Halal certified
ingredients: TOMATO SAUCE WITH HERBS. chopped tomatoes 66%, tomato concentrate 10%, onion 7%, water, carrots 3.5%, vegetable oils (olive, sunflower), sugar, salt, garlic 0.5%, thyme 0.4%, chives 0.2%, parsley 0.2%, flavouring, black pepper 0.01%.

name: Tomato Squeezy Paste
long_description:
Leggo's Squeezy Tomato Paste is perfect for homemade pizzas, spaghetti bolognese, soups, casseroles, curries or any of your favourite family recipes. Its versatile, easy to use and easy to store in a squeezy bottle. Proudly made in Echuca, Victoria, using only the finest quality Australian tomatoes, Leggo's has been passionate about enriching Aussie families and their recipes with the highest quality tomatoes since 1882. Leggo's tomato paste has a 4 Health Star Rating, no artificial colours or flavours it's also Halal certified and suitable for vegans or vegetarians.

- Made in Australia using Australian grown tomatoes
- Triple concentrate for richer flavour
- No artificial colours or flavours
- 4 Health Star Rating
- Halal certified
- Suitable for vegans and vegetarians
- Versatile and a great way to add body to any tomato-based recipe

When it comes to Italian food, Aussies love to do it their way - Leggo's are here to celebrate Aussie twists on classic Italian recipes! Leggo's has been Australian made with quality ingredients for over 130 years - It's How We Do Italian.
ingredients: Concentrated tomato (98%), salt, antioxidant (ascorbic acid), preservatives (202, 234).

description: MUTTI PSCE ROSSORO TOMATO WITH BASIL 400G
long_description:
Fruity and Fragrant

The sweet and intense rossoro tomato is paired with vibrant and aromatic Genovese Basil PDO for a perfectly balanced, fresh sauce.  

Mutti Sugo Speciale combines the fresh taste of 100% Italian tomatoes with the finest ingredients sourced from regions of excellence. Mutti Sugo Speciale has no added sugar or preservatives.

name: Tomato Passata
long_description:
Mutti Tomato Puree is made from the reddest, ripest tomatoes, harvested at their peak in the summer and processed immediately with care and skill to obtain a smooth, creamy puree free from skins and seeds with an inviting sweetness.

Mutti has been processing tomatoes with passion for over 100 years. Its products are made exclusively of Italian tomatoes, with scrupulous supervision of the entire production chain: from selection of the most suitable varieties to inspection in the field, up to harvesting and canning, which is done just hours after the tomatoes arrive at the plant.
ingredients: Tomatoes (99.5%), Salt - Only Italian tomatoes.

name: Sugo Semplice Basil & Onion
description: MUTTI SUGO SEMPLICE BASIL & ONION SUGO
long_description:
Sugo Semplice Basil is a an Italian classic created Mutti-style with finely chopped tomatoes harvested at perfect ripeness and packed within hours. 

This family staple has the traditional flavours of real fresh onion and fresh Italian basil leaves which are added by hand. A splash of extra virgin olive oil rounds out these classic flavours. Enjoy as simple sauce stirred through hot pasta, or as a base to your favourite pasta dish. 

 

  • 100% Italian perfectly ripe tomatoes

  • Filled with natural ingredients

  • Simply stir through hot pasta for a quick and delicious meal
ingredients: Chopped tomatoes 81%, tomato paste 12%, olive oil, sugar, basil 0.9%, onion 0.7%, celery, salt, natural flavourings.

name: Vine Ripened Tomato And Fire Roasted Pepper Pasta Sauce
description: PROVIDORE VINE RIPENED TOMATO AND FIRE ROASTED PEPPER PASTA SAUCE 400G
long_description:
Smoky, sweet, and full of Mediterranean warmth, Providore Tomato & Pepper Sauce is a richly textured combination of premium ingredients sourced at peak ripeness. Red peppers from Italy and Spain are fire-roasted to draw out their natural sweetness and deliver a subtle, charred smokiness. These are then blended into a luxurious tomato base made with fruit from the renowned Parma province, resulting in a sauce that's vibrant and flavourful with every spoonful.

Whether tossed with pasta, spooned over grilled meats, or used as a base for baked dishes, this sauce brings a bold yet balanced taste of the Italian countryside to your table. Free from artificial colours, flavours, or preservatives, it reflects Providore's commitment to honest ingredients and timeless flavour.

- Fire-roasted peppers from Italy & Spain
- Tomato base from Parma province
- No artificial colours, flavours, or preservatives
- Bold, smoky, and naturally sweet
ingredients: Tomatoes (67%) (puree), grilled red bell peppers (20%), onion (3.5%), sunflower oil, sugar, salt, garlic, wine vinegar, food acids (citric, lactic, ascorbic), sweet paprika, chilli, extra virgin olive oil, parsley, pepper.
allergens: May Contain Almond, Cashew, Fish, Milk, Pine Nut, Pistachio

name: Creamy Tomato & Mozzarella Pasta Bake Sauce
long_description:
Satisfy your pasta cravings with Leggo's Creamy Tomato and Mozzarella Pasta Bake, the perfect solution for a quick and delicious meal. Simply pour the creamy sauce over your pasta and bake for just 20 minutes to create a hearty, comforting dish that's sure to become a family favourite. Halal certified and made without any artificial colors, flavours, or preservatives, this pasta bake delivers wholesome goodness in every bite, ideal for a family meal or a special occasion, feel free to add extra veggies and even the kids won't notice!

Whether you're looking for a weeknight dinner or a crowd-pleasing option for your next family event, Leggo's Creamy Tomato and Mozzarella Pasta Bake is a satisfying and tasty choice for all ages. Quick to make, full of flavour, and made with quality ingredients.

- Aus Made
- No Artificial colours or flavours
- No added preservatives.
- Halal Certified

When it comes to Italian food, Aussies love to do it their way - Leggo's are here to celebrate Aussie twists on classic Italian recipes! Leggo's has been Australian made with quality ingredients for over 130 years - It's How We Do Italian.
ingredients: Creamy tomato (87%) (Tomato puree (from paste), diced tomato, cream cheese (milk), cream (milk), parmesan cheese (milk)), vegetables (capsicum, onion), mozzarella cheese (milk) (2%), thickener (1442), sugar, salt, garlic, natural cream flavour (milk), food acid (lactic), basil.

name: Passata Tomato Puree
long_description:
Mutti Tomato Puree is made from the reddest, ripest tomatoes, harvested at their peak in the summer and processed immediately with care and skill to obtain a smooth, creamy puree free from skins and seeds with an inviting sweetness.

Mutti has been processing tomatoes with passion for over 100 years.

Its products are made exclusively of Italian tomatoes, with scrupulous supervision of the entire production chain: from selection of the most suitable varieties to inspection in the field, up to harvesting and canning, which is done just hours after the tomatoes arrive at the plant.
ingredients: Tomatoes (99.5%), Salt - Only Italian tomatoes.

name: Basilico Pasta Sauce
long_description:
Barilla Basilico is a rich and tasty tomato basil pasta sauce, made with care, using selected quality ingredients. 100% sun-ripened Italian tomatoes meet aromatic Italian basil to bring you a delicious pasta sauce. Perfect with any pasta, this Mediterranean sauce brings the pleasure of classic Italian cuisine.
Pairing well with both sophisticated and simple pasta cuts, try this fragrant, everyday Italian pasta sauce with any cut of your choice, including spaghetti, penne and fusilli, for a delicious and quick pasta dinner idea the whole family will love.
Crafted using quality ingredients, Barilla Basilico with fresh tomatoes and Italian basil is the perfect sauce to bring you and your loved ones together. Suitable for vegetarians and vegans, this Barilla sauce has no preservatives and is gluten free.
At Barilla, we are passionate about pasta and have been sharing our passion with the world since 1877. We strive to make Barilla sauce and pasta that are good for you and for the planet - 99.6% of our packaging is designed to be recycled.
Barilla. A sign of love.
  • GMO- Free

  • Free of artificial colours and flavours, sweeteners and preservatives

  • Gluten, Lactose and Fat Free

  • Vegan

  • Halal certified
ingredients: Chopped tomatoes 72%, tomato concentrate 14%, onion, vegetable oils (olive, sunflower), basil 2%, sugar, salt, natural flavouring.

name: Tomato Passata With Basil
long_description:
Mutti Tomato Puree with Basil is made from the ripest, reddest tomatoes and harvested at their peak in the summer. The tomatoes are processed immediately with care and skill to obtain a smooth, creamy puree free from skins and seeds with an inviting sweetness made even more fragrant with the addition of fresh basil. 

Mutti has been processing tomatoes with passion for over 100 years. Its products are made exclusively of Italian tomatoes, with scrupulous supervision of the entire production chain: from selection of the most suitable varieties to inspection in the field, up to harvesting and canning, which is done just hours after tomatoes arrive at the plant.
ingredients: Tomatoes 99%, Salt, Basil 0.1%, Basil Extract.

name: Bolognese Pasta Sauce
long_description:
Barilla Bolognese Sauce is a rich pasta sauce made with natural ingredients and a sweet and mild balance of 100% Italian field-grown tomatoes, onion, garlic and herbs - perfect as a base for ragu. Slowly simmered for a rich taste with a thick texture, this tasty pasta sauce is the perfect partner for just about any Barilla pasta.
Paired well with both sophisticated and simple pasta cuts, try this fragrant, everyday Italian pasta sauce with any cut of your choice, including spaghetti, penne and fusilli.
A perfect everyday Mediterranean sauce, it's great for a delicious and quick pasta dinner idea the whole family will love.
Crafted using quality ingredients, Barilla Bolognese sauce with Italian tomatoes is the perfect pasta sauce to bring you and your loved ones together. Delicious on its own or with meat, this Barilla sauce has no added preservatives and is gluten free.
At Barilla, we are passionate about pasta and have been sharing our passion with the world since 1877. We strive to make Barilla sauce and pasta that are good for you and for the planet - 99.6% of our packaging is designed to be recycled.
Barilla. A sign of love.
  • GMO- Free

  • Free of artificial colours and flavours, sweeteners and preservatives

  • Gluten, Lactose and Fat Free

  • Vegan

  • Halal certified
ingredients: chopped tomatoes 40.9%, water, tomato concentrate 14%, onions 12.5%, vegetable oils (olive, sunflower), carrots 3.5%, salt, natural flavouring, sugar, basil 0.2%, garlic 0.02%.

For those who crave both flavour and flair, this is your pantry's secret to a perfectly spiced Italian meal.

- No artificial colours or flavours
- Authentically Italian

name: Italian Basil Pecorino & Pine Nut Pesto
description: PROVIDORE ITALIAN BASIL PECORINO & PINE NUT PESTO 195G
long_description:
Based on a true traditional Italian recipe, every ingredient in Providore Basil Pesto has been carefully selected to craft the finest pesto available. The Italian-grown basil provides a fresh, herbaceous aroma, complemented by the rich, buttery texture of crushed pine nuts and aged Pecorino Romano DOP cheese, delivers a robust complexity and satisfying saltiness.

This versatile pesto is perfect for stirring through roasted vegetables, tossing with your favourite pasta, or serving with grilled meat or fish to elevate simple dishes into gourmet experiences. Crafted using time-honoured techniques, it embodies the authentic flavours of Italy. Whether enhancing salads or acting as a delectable spread on crusty bread, Providore Basil Pesto transforms everyday meals into culinary masterpieces by blending tradition, quality ingredients, and a passion for exceptional taste.

Every jar invites gourmets to savour Italy's cherished heritage in every delectable mouthful with authentic passion.

name: Pizza Sauce Squeezy Tomato Paste
description: LEGGOS PIZZA SAUCE SQUEEZY TOMATO PASTE 400 GRAM
long_description:
Up your homemade pizza game with Leggo's Squeezy Pizza Sauce. Crafted with rich tomatoes, garlic, onion, and aromatic herbs, this double concentrate sauce is perfect for elevating your homemade creations. Whether you're making classic pizzas, mini pizza muffins, or loading up a focaccia, this sauce delivers bold, authentic flavour in every squeeze. It's not just for pizza-stir it into soups, stews, or use it in lasagne, meatballs, and spaghetti bolognese to add a rich tomato base with a hint of parsley. Made with no artificial colours or flavours and Halal certified, it's a wholesome choice the whole family can enjoy. The easy-to-use squeezy bottle makes prep quick and mess-free. Versatile, flavourful, and pantry-friendly, Leggo's Pizza Sauce is your go-to for delicious, homemade meals with that pizzeria-style finish-straight from your kitchen.

- Made in Australia using Australian grown tomatoes
- Double concentrate for richer flavour
- No artificial colours or flavours
- 4 Health Star Rating

When it comes to Italian food, Aussies love to do it their way - Leggo's are here to celebrate Aussie twists on classic Italian recipes! Leggo's has been Australian made with quality ingredients for over 130 years - It's How We Do Italian.
ingredients: Concentrated tomato (93%), garlic, onion & herbs blend (7%) (garlic, onion, salt, herbs, antioxidant (ascorbic acid), preservatives (202, 234), black pepper, natural flavour).

name: Premium Tomato Paste
long_description:
Bring richness and authentic depth to your cooking with Providore Italian Tomato Paste. Made from 100% Italian tomatoes and triple-concentrated for maximum flavour, this paste is a must-have in every kitchen.

Stir it into homemade soups, curries, sauces and casseroles for a rich, lush addition. Free from artificial colours and flavours, it's a pure expression of quality ingredients and traditional Italian craftsmanship. Whether used as a base or a finishing touch, a small amount delivers full-bodied tomato flavour and smooth texture that transforms everyday meals. Conveniently packed in a mess-free, resealable tube, it's perfect for portion control and freshness. From the heart of Italy to your table, Providore brings the essence of Mediterranean cooking to life - simple, flavourful, and undeniably Italian.

- Made from 100% Italian tomatoes
- Triple-concentrated for bold, rich flavour
- No artificial colours or flavours
- Ideal for sauces, soups, curries, and more
- Convenient tube for mess-free use

Elevate everyday cooking with Providore D'Italia - flavour at its finest

name: Arrabbiata Pasta Sauce
long_description:
Barilla Arrabbiata Sauce is a rich pasta sauce made with natural ingredients and a sweet and mild balance of 100% Italian field-grown tomatoes and spicy chillis. Slowly simmered for a rich taste with a thick texture, this tasty pasta sauce is the perfect partner for just about any Barilla pasta.
Paired well with both sophisticated and simple pasta cuts, try this fragrant, everyday Italian pasta sauce with any cut of your choice, including spaghetti, penne and fusilli.
A perfect everyday Mediterranean sauce, it's great for a delicious and quick pasta dinner idea the whole family will love. Crafted using quality ingredients, Barilla Bolognese sauce with Italian tomatoes is the perfect pasta sauce to bring you and your loved ones together. Delicious on its own or with meat, this Barilla sauce has no added preservatives and is gluten free.

Barilla. A sign of love.

Leggo's rich and smooth tomato paste is perfect for homemade pizzas, spaghetti bolognese, soups, casseroles, curries or any of your favourite family recipes. It's versatile, easy to use and easy to store in a 500g Jar. Proudly made in Echuca, Victoria, using only the finest quality Australian tomatoes, Leggo's has been passionate about enriching Aussie families and their recipes with the highest quality tomatoes since 1882. Leggo's tomato paste has a 4.5 Health Star Rating, no artificial colours or flavours and has no added preservatives. It's also Halal certified and suitable for vegans or vegetarians.

name: Tuna Bake Pasta Sauce
long_description:
Leggo's Tuna Bake with Spinach & Garlic is the perfect addition to your kitchen for a quick, delicious, and family-friendly meal. This rich and velvety sauce blends the flavours of creamy goodness with fresh spinach and aromatic garlic, making it the ideal base for a classic tuna bake. Simply add your favourite pasta, tuna and cheese, and you have a comforting dish that's sure to please everyone at the table. Whether you're cooking for a busy weeknight dinner or preparing a special family gathering, Leggo's Tuna Pasta bake sauce will bring a burst of flavour and convenience to your meal.

Made with high-quality Australian ingredients, Leggo's sauce contains no artificial colors or preservatives, so you can feel good about what you're serving to your family. Quick to prepare and full of flavour, Leggo's Creamy Tuna Pasta Bake with Spinach and Garlic Sauce is your go-to choice for a wholesome, easy dinner any night of the week.

- Aus Made
- No Artificial colours or flavours
- No added preservatives.
- Halal Certified

name: Gourmet Pasta Sauce Tomato & Chilli Oil
description: LEGGO'S GOURMET PASTA SAUCE TOMATO & CHILLI OIL 390G
long_description:
HOME DINNERS & DINNER PARTIES JUST GOT MORE EXCITING. Level up your food with fan-favourite UmamiPapi chilli oil & juicy vine-ripened Aussie tomatoes, blended together for tasty perfection.

UmamiPapi Chilli Oil contains onions, shallots, Sichuan peppercorns and other spices - bringing you pasta with a twist.

- She's spicy: Two out of three chilli rating

- No Added Colours or Flavours

- 100% Australian Grown Tomatoes


RECIPE SUGGESTIONS

Make a Italian-Asian fusion pasta by heating up the sauce and stirring through cooked pasta. Optional: Garnish with fresh basil & top with burrata if you're a little extra like we are.

Other recipe ideas: Make a mind-blowing & easy chilli prawns dish with this sauce (Recipe link on our website and on our packaging).


WHAT MAKES LEGGO'S GOURMET RANGE SPECIAL?

Leggo's Gourmet Pasta Sauces are top-quality pasta sauces to make weeknight meals more delicious. We combine iconic ingredients to make your next pasta night oh-so-good, Try it and taste the difference!

name: Tomato Puree
long_description:
Leggo's source the finest Australian plump ripe tomatoes, we peel and seed them and then concentrate the tomatoes into a smooth, seed free tomato puree. Proudly made in Echuca, Victoria, using only the best quality Australian tomatoes, Leggo's has been passionate about enriching Aussie families and their recipes with the highest quality tomatoes since 1882. Leggo's Tomato Puree is a versatile ingredient that can be uses in a variety of recipes and dishes. It's perfect for making sauces, soups, stews, and curries, adding a rich, smooth texture and a deep, concentrated tomato flavour. Leggo's tomato puree also works well in casseroles, meatballs, or braised dishes, enhancing the savory flavours, its thick consistency makes it a great way to add body to any tomato-based recipe. Leggo's tomato puree has no artificial colours or flavours and has no added preservatives. It's also Halal certified and suitable for vegans or vegetarians.


- Made in Australia using Australian grown tomatoes

- No artificial colours or flavours

- No added preservatives

- Halal certified

- Suitable for vegans and vegetarians

- Versatile and a great way to add body to any tomato-based recipe


When it comes to Italian food, Aussies love to do it their way - Leggo's are here to celebrate Aussie twists on classic Italian recipes! Leggo's has been Australian made with quality ingredients for over 130 years - It's How We Do Italian.

name: Vine Ripened Tomato And Caramelised Onion Pasta Sauce
description: PROVIDORE VINE RIPENED TOMATO AND CARAMELISED ONION PASTA SAUCE 400G
long_description:
Discover the rich, layered flavour of Providore Tomato & Onion Sauce, a truly artisanal creation from the heart of Italy. Sweet borettane onions-grown in the fertile Pianura Padana region-are carefully grilled and slowly caramelised overnight with apple cider vinegar and aromatic herbs. They're then gently folded into a robust tomato base made from sun-ripened fruit harvested in Emilia-Romagna, resulting in a sauce that's sweet, savoury, and full of complexity. Ideal for pairing with pasta, layering in lasagne, or spooning over roasted vegetables, this sauce brings a rustic yet refined depth to your home cooking. With no artificial colours, flavours or preservatives, it's a celebration of real ingredients, slow preparation, and Italian culinary tradition.

- Made with caramelised borettane onions
- Tomato base from Emilia-Romagna
- No artificial colours, flavours, or preservatives
- A balance of sweet, tangy, and savoury
ingredients: Tomatoes (76%) (pulp), borettane onions (12%), sunflower oil, cider vinegar, sugar, salt, laurel, parsley, food acid (citric), pepper.
allergens: May Contain Almond, Cashew, Fish, Milk, Pine Nut, Pistachio

name: Stir Through Sundried Tomato & Roasted Garlic Pasta Sauce
description: LEGGOS STIR THROUGH SAUCE:SUNDRIED TMTO RST GLC:.:350 GRAM
long_description:
Elevate your pasta dishes with the intense, savoury depth of Leggo's Stir Through Sundried Tomato & Garlic sauce.
Featuring sun-ripened tomatoes and slow-roasted garlic blended with smooth olive oil, this sauce offers a rich, concentrated burst of Mediterranean flavour.
Simply stir it through hot pasta and enjoy a gourmet meal in minutes-or use it as a base to add complexity to other sauces, soups, or even pizza. The perfect mix of tangy and aromatic, it's a must-have for garlic lovers and tomato fans alike. Free from artificial colours or preservatives, this 350g jar is a pantry staple that delivers flavour and convenience in one.

- No artificial colours or flavours
- No added preservatives
- Halal Certified
- Suitable for vegans and vegetarians
- Dinner ready in minutes - Simply stir contents of jar through pasta and serve

When it comes to Italian food, Aussies love to do it their way - Leggo's are here to celebrate Aussie twists on classic Italian recipes! Leggo's has been Australian made with quality ingredients for over 130 years - It's How We Do Italian.
ingredients: Tomato puree (56%) (from paste), diced tomatoes (25%), water, sundried tomatoes (4.5%), canola oil, olive oil, salt, garlic, yeast extract, sugar, roasted garlic (0.4%), parsley, lemon juice concentrate, colour (paprika oleoresins).

name: Sugo Passata Basil & Parsley
description: LEGGOS SUGO ITALIAN HERBS WITH BAISIL PASSATA::700 GRAM
long_description:
Enhance your everyday meals with the rich, delicious taste of Leggo's Italian Herbs Passata. Made from ripe tomatoes and a fragrant blend of Italian herbs, this smooth passata adds a delicious depth of flavour to countless dishes. Whether you're using it as a lighter pizza base, pouring it over cannelloni, or stirring it into homemade soups and stews, it brings a fresh, herbaceous aroma to your cooking.

Low in salt and made with no artificial colours, flavours, or added preservatives, this passata is a wholesome choice for the whole family. Halal certified and suitable for vegans and vegetarians, it's a versatile pantry staple perfect for a variety of dietary needs. From quick weeknight meals to slow-cooked favourites, Leggo's Passata Italian Herbs helps you create flavourful, nourishing dishes with ease.

- Made in Australia with Australian grown tomatoes
- No Artificial colours or flavours
- No added preservatives
- 4.5 Health Star Rating
- Suitable for vegans and vegetarians
- Halal Certified

name: Basil Pesto Alla Genovese Pasta Sauce
description: BARILLA BASIL PESTO ALLA GENOVESE PASTA SAUCE 190G
long_description:
Barilla Pesto Genovese is made with Italian basil and the perfect Parmigiano Reggiano PDO. These two ingredients combine to create a delicious, creamy pesto sauce worthy of being the main dish at lunch or dinner.
Add Barilla Pesto ready-made sauce to your favourite dishes to pump up the flavour and make a meal to be proud of. Whether you've just got home from the gym and need a quick, healthy meal or want to impress your loved ones, our gluten-free pasta sauce helps you bring authentic Italian food to your dinner table.
Pair with grilled chicken or pasta, or spread onto pizza, and make tonight Italian night with Barilla pesto sauce. The taste everyone loves”.
At Barilla, we are passionate about pasta and have been sharing our passion with the world since 1877 when the first pasta shapes were made by hand using simple tools. We strive to make Barilla sauce and pasta that are good for you and the planet.       
  • Our 100% Italian sweet basil pesto is cultivated through sustainable practice

  • GMO- Free

  • No added artificial colours, sweeteners and preservatives

  • Gluten Free

  • Trans fat free.
ingredients: PESTO SAUCE WITH BASIL. vegetable oils (olive, sunflower), basil 30%, cashews, Parmigiano Reggiano cheese 5% (milk), maize soluble fibre, whey powder (milk), salt, milk protein, extra virgin olive oil, sugar, basil extract, natural flavourings (milk), acidity regulator- lactic acid, garlic. Contains cashews and milk. May contain other tree nuts.

Ready-to-use sauce, simply spread on your favourite pizza base.

100% Italian - Tomatoes from certified production

name: Chicken Cacciatore Sauce
long_description:
Easy and delicious, Chicken Tonight Cacciatore Simmer Sauce is perfect for making restaurant-style chicken, rice and pasta dishes at home. Chicken cacciatore has never been easier to prepare with Chicken Tonight Cacciatore Simmer Sauce. Serve with a side of pasta or rice for a quick and satisfying midweek lunch. Diced tomatoes, mushrooms, capsicum, onions and other ingredients join forces to make the most delicious sauce. Chicken Tonight Cacciatore Simmer Sauce is made with no artificial colours or flavours. Make a hearty chicken cacciatore in no time at home or use it to add extra texture and flavour to a number of vegan and vegetarian recipes.

-Rich cacciatore cooking sauce

-Suitable for vegetarians and vegans

-No artificial colours or flavours

-Perfect complement to chicken, rice and pasta dishes
ingredients: Tomatoes (74%) (reconstituted, diced), tomato paste (11%), mushroom (5%), capsicum (4%), sugar, onion (2%), salt, herbs (contains basil, parsley), black pepper, natural flavour.

name: Recipe Base Pad Thai
long_description:
Elevate your home-cooked meals with Continental Takeout Temptations Pad Thai Seasoning Mix. Proudly made in Australia with no artificial colours or flavours, it delivers a tangy, sweet and savoury taste that transforms simple noodles into a flavour-packed feast. Simply follow the on-pack instructions for an easy way to recreate the irresistible flavours of your favourite takeout any night of the week. Want a meat-free alternative? Use firm tofu in place of chicken for an equally delicious veggie meal. At Continental, our mission is to make irresistible food easy, no matter the skill level. With our simple recipes and tasty flavours, eating at home has never been easier! We provide food hacks and solutions so you can create craveable snacks and meals that appeal to all the senses, proving that real, flavourful food is deliciously easy to make. Say goodbye to boring and welcome to the joy of irresistibly tasty food!
  • Continental Takeout Temptations Pad Thai Seasoning Mix brings the irresistible flavours of your favourite takeout dish right to your kitchen

  • Real good and simply tasty, use it to elevate your home-cooked meals in 30 minutes

  • This seasoning mix contains no artificial colours or flavours

  • Available in 4 tasty flavours: Pad Thai, Chicken Kebab, Singapore Noodles and Korean BBQ

  • Our Takeout Temptations seasoning range is proudly made in Australia

  • At Continental, we make it easy for everyone to enjoy quick meals and irresistible food at home.

name: Creamy Chicken Curry Recipe Base
description: CONTINENTAL RECIPE MIX:CREAMY CHICKEN CURRY:.:30 GRAM
long_description:
In just a few easy steps, create a delicious mid-week meal the whole family will enjoy, with the help of Continental. With the help of our Creamy Chicken Curry recipe base, you can create this family favourite dish with a creamy mild curry sauce. Ready in just 30 minutes, this dish serves four people. All of our Continental Recipe Bases contain no artificial colours, flavours and added MSG, and are made with real ingredients, simply dried and combined to create a perfectly balanced flavour for your favourite dish. All you need is chicken, milk, carrot and peas to have dinner ready in no time. You can also add other veggies such as broccoli or green beans for a tasty twist! And serve with a fresh salad. At Continental, we love food the way you do. We know how much you value good, nutritious, flavourful food, as well as authentic home cooking. It feels good to cook, and even better to bring pleasure to the ones you love, through the food you put on the table. How we preserve and lock in flavour in our products is just as important as how we grow our vegetables in the first place. That can mean drying, freezing, boiling, or turning them into paste - whatever suits the Continental recipe they'll be making. For over 50 years now, our chefs at Continental have combined their expertise, love of flavour, and only the finest ingredients to help you create great tasting meals every day.Go to http://continental.com.au/ to find more recipe inspirations and additional flavours such as sheperds pie, curried sausages, spaghetti Bolognese, beef stroganoff, chicken curry, beef stew, chicken risotto, swedish meatballs, chicken korma and many more instant sauces.
  • Continental Recipe Bases are made with real ingredients, simply dried and combined to create a perfectly balanced flavour for your favourite dish

  • In just a few easy steps, create a delicious mid-week meal the whole family will enjoy, with the help of Continental

  • All you need is chicken, milk, carrot and peas to have dinner ready in no time. You can also add other veggies such as broccoli or green beans for a tasty twist! And serve with a fresh salad.

  • Ready in less than 30 minutes

  • No artificial colours, flavours and added MSG

  • Serves 4.

long_description:
Our Hyderabad Red Korma is based on a regional favourite and has all of the hallmarks of typical Hyderabad dum-style cooking. It is a lovely balance between the sweet and sour of the onions and tomatoes, with warming flavours of ginger, garlic and simple spices, made creamy with both yoghurt and nut pastes.

 

The Spice Tailor range is truly versatile. Simply take your pick from the bits to buy, add the specially selected spices, stir in the sauce and you have a fresh, authentic Indian meal in just 10 minutes!

name: Spaghetti Bolognaise Recipe Base Serves 4
long_description:
Continental Spaghetti Bolognese Seasoning Base is the perfect way to create a delicious and easy meal that the whole family will love in just a few simple steps. Made with tomatoes, mushrooms, herbs and spices, our traditional Italian spaghetti Bolognese base makes it easy to make this delicious recipe.With no artificial colours or flavours, Continental Recipe Bases deliver perfectly balanced flavour for your favourite dish. This Continental recipe base is made with tomato, basil, garlic, onion and black pepper. All you need to add is beef mince, a can of chopped tomatoes, some mushrooms and spaghetti to have dinner ready in no time. You can also add other veggies, such as diced carrots, for a tasty twist! Serve with freshly cooked pasta.At Continental, we love food the way you do. We know how much you value good, nutritious, flavourful food, as well as authentic home cooking. It feels good to cook, and even better to bring a smile to your loved ones by putting delicious food on the table. For over 70 years now, our chefs at Continental have combined their expertise, love of flavour and only the finest ingredients to help you create great-tasting meals every day.
  • Continental Spaghetti Bolognese Seasoning Base gives you an authentic Bolognese every time

  • This Seasoning Base serves four, so you can create a delicious and easy meal the whole family will enjoy in just a few simple steps

  • Made with tomato, basil, garlic, onion and black pepper, carefully blended to give your favourite dish a perfectly balanced flavour

  • Continental seasoning bases are free from artificial colours and flavours

  • Made in Australia with high-quality ingredients for deliciously tasty meals

  • Continental recipe bases are all about bringing great tastes and rich flavours to your table.

name: Butter Chicken Family Jar
long_description:
A silky, rich creamy Indian curry sauce.

1. Simply fry 5-6 diced chicken breasts in a little oil until browned.
2. Add the sauce and simmer for 5-6 minutes until all is cooked through.

Serve with rice, naans and Sherwood's chutney for a tangy twist to your meal. Also great with your favourite protein alternative.

Please ensure food is fully cooked and piping hot before serving.

name: Massaman Curry
long_description:
Our Massaman curry is a deeply flavourful blend of Indian spices, Thai aromatics and coconut milk. It was traditionally made with beef and potatoes and finished with crushed peanuts, but it is a delicious and moreish curry with almost any ingredient.

This pack contains a pouch of spices and aromatics, a smaller pouch with our spice paste and a larger one with a coconut sauce.

Spice Routes
A cuisine is a complex tapestry of people, geography and history. Early travellers indelibly influenced South East Asian food with their introduction of spices, chillies and curries. New dishes were created and old ones evolved to give us a whole new spectrum of delicious spiced favourites.

At The Spice Tailor, we have been on our own journey down these old spice routes to explore these delicious cuisines. Our old mandate that all our food must taste authentic and be cooked in the same way they are at home still holds. We are really proud to introduce you to our new range of authentic curries!

  • 3 simple steps

  • Ready in 10 mins.

  • No artificial preservatives, colouring or flavourings!

  • Vegetarian friendly
ingredients: Coconut Cream (44%), Water, Soy Sauce (Water, SOYABEANS, WHEAT, Salt), Garlic, Lemongrass (3%), Dry Spices (2%), Galangal Root (2%), Sugar, Raw Sugar, Coriander Seeds, Red Chilli, Rice Flour, Kaffir Lime Leaves, Salt, Shallot Powder

name: Honey Mustard Recipe Base
long_description:
Enjoy Keen's famous heritage and bold flavours in our New Meal Bases. Ready in under 30 minutes, Keen's Meal Bases provide an easy, tasty solution to weeknight dinners when you are short on time. They provide the perfect base while also being customisable for vegetarians, spice lovers or those who still like to be creative with their cooking, even when short on time. Available in family favourite, signature Keen's dishes.

Honey Mustard Chicken Recipe

Serves: 3, Prep: 5 mins, Cook: 20 mins

All You Need

350 g diced chicken

Suggested sides...

Cooked Rice

Garlic bread

Steamed Greens

How To

1. Brown chicken in a lightly greased hot pan.

2. Add the Keen's meal base, stir through until just boiling.

3. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10-15 minutes or until chicken is tender and cooked through.

4. Serve with suggested sides.

Tip- Make a delicious pie, just top with puff pastry and bake until golden.

- Chilli rating: mild

- No added colours, flavours or perservatives

- Serves 3

For more creative cooking ideas and information about our complete range go to mccormick.com.au/Keens
ingredients: Water, Onion, Carrot, Cream (Milk), Sugar, Thickeners (1442, Xanthan Gum), Honey (2%), Mustard (2%), Vegetable Oil, Garlic, Salt, Milk Solids, Spring Onion, Acidity Regulator (Citric Acid), Spices

name: Italian Herb Roast Potatoes
long_description: This vegetable side dish as prepared, is a tasty addition to any main meal rewarding your family with 2 of the 5 daily recommended serves of vegetables#. - No artificial colours or flavours - No added MSG - Serves 6 Italian Herb Potatoes Serves 6 Prep 5 mins Cooking 40 mins What you need - 1 tbsp (20 mL) vegetable oil - 5 medium (1 kg) potato, peeled & cubed - 1 x 40 g sachet McCormick Italian Herb Potatoes Recipe Base What to do 1. Preheat oven to 200°C (180°C fan forced). Line a baking tray with baking paper. 2. In a bowl mix oil and potatoes well, add recipe base and toss through to coat evenly. Place potato in a single layer onto lined baking tray. 3. Tossing the potatoes half way, bake for 40 minutes, until golden brown and tender. Serve as a side to your main meal or as a tasty snack. Flavour inspiration! Speed things up -precook the potato cubes in the microwave for 5 minutes then continue as directed, baking until golden. For more creative cooking ideas and information about our complete range go to mccormick.com.au or freecall 1800 802 223 #Based on the NHMRC Australian Dietary Guidelines (2013), a serve of vegetables is 75g.

name: Shepherds Pie Recipe Base
long_description:
Creating authentic shepherd's pie has never been so easy with the help of this Continental fast and simple recipe base. Just add 4 ingredients to create a delicious meal for 4! All of our Continental Recipe Bases contain no artificial colours, flavours and added MSG, and are made with real ingredients, simply dried and combined to create a perfectly balanced flavour for your favourite dish. At Continental, we love food the way you do. We know how much you value good, nutritious, flavourful food, as well as authentic home cooking. It feels good to cook, and even better to bring pleasure to the ones you love, through the food you put on the table. How we preserve and lock in flavour in our products is just as important as how we grow our vegetables in the first place. That can mean drying, freezing, boiling, or turning them into paste - whatever suits the Continental recipe they'll be making. Drying is one of the oldest ways to preserve food there is, going back thousands of years. It's simple, safe and helps keep the colour, aroma and flavour of our ingredients for longer - naturally. We don't need to add any preservatives, and it protects the natural flavour. For over 50 years now, our chefs at Continental have combined their expertise, love of flavour, and only the finest ingredients to help you create great tasting meals every day.Go to http://continental.com.au/ to find more recipe inspirations and additional flavours such as sheperds pie, curried sausages, spaghetti Bolognese, beef stroganoff, chicken curry, beef stew, chicken risotto, swedish meatballs, chicken korma and many more instant sauces.
  • Continental Recipe Bases are made with real ingredients, simply dried and combined to create a perfectly balanced flavour for your favourite dish

  • In just a few easy steps, create a delicious mid-week meal the whole family will enjoy, with the help of Continental recipe base.

  • This Shepherds Pie Recipe Base is made with real onions, black pepper, sage and soy sauce.

  • All you need is potatoes, milk, beef mince, an onion and a carrot to create this delicious dish the whole family will enjoy. Serve with green vegetables for a complete meal.

  • No artificial colours, flavours and added MSG

  • Serves 4.

name: Creamy Tuna Mornay Recipe Base Serves 4
description: CONTINENTAL RECIPE MIX:CREAMY TUNA MORNAY:.:30 GRAM
long_description:
In just a few easy steps, create a delicious mid-week meal the whole family will enjoy, with the help of Continental. This Creamy Tuna Mornay recipe base makes a family pasta favourite with tuna in a cheese sauce, finished under the grill with a golden cheese top. Ready in just 30 minutes, this dish serves four people. All of our Continental Recipe Bases contain no artificial colours, flavours and added MSG, and are made with real ingredients, simply dried and combined to create a perfectly balanced flavour for your favourite dish. All you need is milk, pasta, corn, tuna and grated cheese to have dinner ready in no time. You can also add other veggies such as broccoli or green beans for a tasty twist! And serve with a fresh salad. At Continental, we love food the way you do. We know how much you value good, nutritious, flavourful food, as well as authentic home cooking. It feels good to cook, and even better to bring pleasure to the ones you love, through the food you put on the table. For over 50 years now, our chefs at Continental have combined their expertise, love of flavour, and only the finest ingredients to help you create great tasting meals every day.Go to http://continental.com.au/ to find more recipe inspirations and additional flavours such as sheperds pie, curried sausages, spaghetti Bolognese, beef stroganoff, chicken curry, beef stew, chicken risotto, swedish meatballs, chicken korma and many more instant sauces.
  • In just a few easy steps, create a delicious mid-week meal the whole family will enjoy, with the help of Continental

  • All you need is milk, pasta, corn, tuna and grated cheese to have dinner ready in no time

  • Ready in just 30 minutes

  • No added MSG

  • No artificial colours & flavours

  • Serves 4.

name: Produce Partner Scalloped Potatoes
long_description: This vegetable side dish as prepared, is a tasty addition to any main meal with 2 # of the daily recommended 5 serves of vegetables. - No artificial colours or flavours - No added MSG - Serves 6 Scalloped Potatoes Serves 6 Prep 5 mins Cooking 1 hour What you need - 5 medium (1 kg) potatoes, peeled & thinly sliced - 1 x 40 g sachet McCormick Scalloped Potatoes Recipe Base - 1 cup (250 mL) boiling water - 3/4 cup (180 mL) thickened cream - 1/2 cup (50g) grated tasty cheese What to do 1. Preheat oven to 200°C (180°C fan forced). Layer potato slices in a lightly greased 20 cm square ovenproof dish. 2. In a medium jug whisk the recipe base and boiling water together until combined. Then stir in the cream. Pour over the potato, cover with foil and bake for 45 minutes. 3. Remove foil, sprinkle over the cheese and return to oven for a further 15 minutes or until the top is golden brown and potato tender. Flavour inspiration! Substitute all or some of the regular potato with sweet or purple potato. For a tasty, colourful addition to any meal.For more creative cooking ideas and information about our complete range go to mccormick.com.au or freecall 1800 802 223 #Based on the NHMRC Australian Dietary Guidelines (2013), a serve of vegetables is 75g.

name: Delhi Biryani
long_description:
Biryani is an Indian favourite with foreign beginnings. It's origins are with the Mughals of Central Asia, where it was originally a meat and rice dish. But once they brought it to India, it gained in complexity with the use of spices and different regional influences as it travelled through the sub-continent. Our biryanis reflect these historical heritages in their many layers of flavours.


Our Delhi biryani is well-spiced, full-bodied and truly moreish, with its delicious layers of spices, tomatoes and yoghurt.


No artificial preservatives, colourings or flavourings!

  • 3 Simple Steps

  • Ready in 15 mins.

  • Suitable for Vegetarian

  • No artificial preservatives, colourings or flavourings!

  • Restaurant quality in minutes

name: Curried Sausage Recipe Base
long_description:
Enjoy Keen's famous heritage and bold flavours in our New Meal Bases. Ready in under 30 minutes, Keen's Meal Bases provide an easy, tasty solution to weeknight dinners when you are short on time. They provide the perfect base while also being customisable for vegetarians, spice lovers or those who still like to be creative with their cooking, even when short on time. Available in family favourite, signature Keen's dishes.

Curried Sausages Recipe
Serves: 3, Prep: 5 mins, Cook: 20 Mins
All You Need
- 500 g beef sausages
Suggested sides...
- Cooked Rice
- Fresh Parsley
How To
1. Brown sausages in a lightly greased hot pan. Remove and slice.
2. Return sausages to pan add the Keen's meal base, stir through until just boiling.
3. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 10-15 minutes or until sausages are cooked through.
4. Serve with suggested sides.
Tip- Be inspired and try pork, chicken or plant-based sausages in your curry.
- Chilli rating: Mild
- No added colours, flavours or preservatives
- Serves 3

For more creative cooking ideas and information about our complete range go to mccormick.com.au/Keens

Combine it with beef mince, rice, carrots and cabbage for a convenient and easy meal any night of the week.At Continental, we take pride in using only real ingredients in our recipe bases. We believe in good, nutritious, flavourful food that brings back memories of authentic home cooking. Continental is committed to consistently delivering flavourful, convenient and quality products. We know how much Aussies value delicious, nutritious food as well as authentic home cooking, so we go to extraordinary lengths to be your ally in the kitchen - providing guaranteed taste and making meals irresistibly tasty. Our Chow Mein Mince seasoning mix contains no artificial colours, flavours or added MSG - so you can feel good about what you're feeding your family. Visit our website for recipe inspirations and a wide range of instant sauces, including shepherd's pie, curried sausages, Spaghetti Bolognese, beef stroganoff, chicken curry, beef stew, chicken risotto, Swedish meatballs, chicken korma and many more. With Continental, you can create delicious meals that your whole family will love without spending hours in the kitchen.

  • At Continental, we go to extraordinary lengths in pursuit of great flavour to ensure a great-tasting meal every time

name: Curried Sausages Recipe Base Serves 4
long_description:
In just a few easy steps, create a delicious mid-week meal the whole family will enjoy, with the help of Continental. This Curried Sausages recipe base is made up of a selection of finely ground spices which come together to make a dish the whole family will enjoy. Ready in just 35 minutes, this dish serves four people. All of our Continental Recipe Bases contain no artificial colours, flavours and added MSG, and are made with real ingredients, simply dried and combined to create a perfectly balanced flavour for your favourite dish. All you need is beef sausages, onion, tomato sauce and carrots to create this delicious dish. Serve with mashed potato and peas for a complete meal. At Continental, we love food the way you do. We know how much you value good, nutritious, flavourful food, as well as authentic home cooking. It feels good to cook, and even better to bring pleasure to the ones you love, through the food you put on the table. How we preserve and lock in flavour in our products is just as important as how we grow our vegetables in the first place. That can mean drying, freezing, boiling, or turning them into paste - whatever suits the Continental recipe they'll be making. For over 50 years now, our chefs at Continental have combined their expertise, love of flavour, and only the finest ingredients to help you create great tasting meals every day.Go to http://continental.com.au/ to find more recipe inspirations and additional flavours such as sheperds pie, curried sausages, spaghetti Bolognese, beef stroganoff, chicken curry, beef stew, chicken risotto, swedish meatballs, chicken korma and many more instant sauces.
  • Continental Recipe Bases are made with real ingredients, simply dried and combined to create a perfectly balanced flavour for your favourite dish

  • In just a few easy steps, create a delicious mid-week meal the whole family will enjoy, with the help of Continental.

  • All you need is beef sausages, onion, tomato sauce and carrots to create this delicious dish the whole family will enjoy. Serve with mashed potato and peas for a complete meal.

  • A quick and easy dinner idea that you can have on the table in just 35 minutes.

  • No artificial colours, flavours and added MSG

  • Serves 4.

long_description:
This sauce is for the Barbecue lovers. Add delicious smokey barbecue flavours to your favourite foods with MasterFoods Smokey Barbecue Sauce. A delicious blend of ripe tomatoes, onion, a smokey hit and a sprinkle of carefully selected spices. Perfect for burgers, steaks and snags. This tasty sauce contains no artificial preservatives.
  • - No artificial preservatives

  • - Made in Australia

  • - Vegan friendly

  • - Delicious savoury, sweet and smokey flavour

long_description:
MasterFoods Aussie Farmers Squeezy Tomato Sauce comes from our farmers to your family. Made with 100% plump, vine ripened Australian tomatoes, grown by our passionate tomato farmers across Australia. This convenient and easy to use inverted squeeze bottle is perfect for BBQs, picnics, family dinners and large gatherings.
  • No artificial colours, flavours or preservatives

  • Made in Australia with 100% locally grown Aussie tomatoes

  • Gluten free

  • Vegan friendly

  • Flavour up with MasterFoods

name: Original Barbecue Sauce
description: HP ORIGINAL BARBECUE BBQ SAUCE 390 ML
long_description:
HP Sauce the original brown sauce is a universal condiment famous for its unique flavour. Crafted using the highest quality ingredients, this brown sauce can be used for making tasty sandwiches, hearty stews or casseroles, or even savoury grilled dishes. The Original HP Sauce is everyone's favourite, with its legendary and uniquely distinctive flavour that is rich, tangy and spicy. Crafted using the highest quality ingredients and a closely guarded secret recipe, The Original HP Sauce is sure to spark your interest - so find out why it's such a staple in many family pantries. Made with natural flavours and no added colours, it is 99% fat free and suitable for vegetarians.
  • The original brown sauce

  • Rich, tangy and spicy flavour

  • Made with the highest quality ingredients

  • Try on jacket potatoes or Heinz Baked Beans

  • Great on sausages and bacon sandwiches

name: Smokey Barbeque Sauce
long_description:
Barbecue time is now even more exciting with Heinz Smokey Barbecue Sauce. It's strong flavour profile makes it a great BBQ sauce option for any choice of meats. Heinz Barbecue Sauce has the finest smoked hickory flavour, and is made without any preservatives. You can use it as a sauce for steaks, sausages and chicken to add a rich and smokey taste.
  • A perfect get-together deserves the perfect dish - elevate the taste of your favourite meats with the smokey, rich flavour of Heinz Smokey Barbecue Sauce

  • Versatile as a BBQ sauce and a marinade. Add it to the cooking process for ribs and chicken wings or enjoy it as a dipping accompaniment.

  • Not only is it delicious, Heinz Barbeque sauce has no preservatives.

  • Don't settle for standard barbecue sauce - try Heinz Smokey Barbecue Sauce for deep, rich and smokey flavour you'll love.

name: Spicy Red Sauce Hot Sauce

Get spicy with Fountain Spicy Red Sauce. Containing no artificial colours or flavours, it can be used in meals such as nachos and pasta, or as a dipping sauce for hot chips and potato wedges. Fountain Spicy Red Sauce adds flavour to any dish. With no artificial colours or flavours, it is perfect with burgers, steaks and hotdogs. Mix with mayonnaise and lemon juice for a quick seafood sauce or pour over corn chips and grilled cheese as an easy topping for nachos.
  • Spicy sauce made with tomato and capsicum

  • No preservatives

  • Contains no artificial colours or flavours

  • Perfect with burgers, steaks and hotdogs

  • Mix with mayonnaise and lemon juice for a quick seafood sauce

Naturally sweetened with extracts of the stevia leaf, Heinz Tomato Ketchup 50% Less Added Sugar & Salt (Contains 50% less sugar and salt than the regular Heinz Tomato Ketchup 500mL) is the sauce your kitchen has been missing. No barbecue is complete without it. It's our sun ripened tomatoes, along with with our passion and knowledge that give our recipe it's unique flavour. Now with 50% less added sugar and salt*, this ketchup is the ultimate addition to sausages, burgers and sandwiches, or as a dip for chips, nuggets and onion rings. Heinz Tomato Ketchup 50% Less Added Sugar & Salt* contains no preservatives, and no artificial colours, flavours or sweeteners. *Contains 50% less sugar and salt than the regular Heinz Tomato Ketchup 500mL.
  • Iconic Heinz Taste, 50% Less Added Sugar & Salt*. Enjoy the taste of Heinz made with real tomatoes.

  • No Preservatives. No Artificial Colours. No Artificial Flavours.

  • Enjoy the delicious taste of Heinz without compromise.

  • Convenient Squeeze Bottle: Easy to use with a flip cap, perfect for precise application and on-the-go enjoyment.

  • Versatile Condiment Sauce: Heinz Ketchup 50% Less Added Sugar & Salt* is the perfect accompaniment for hot chips, burgers, hot dogs and many other family favourites.

name: Ketchup Tomato Sauce
long_description:
Heinz Tomato Ketchup is a delicious, versatile condiment for any meal. Enhance the flavour of your favourite fries, burgers, sandwiches and pies by adding this classic tomato ketchup. Crafted with sun ripened tomatoes and vinegar, Heinz Tomato Ketchup contains no preservatives, artificial colours or flavours. It's known for its umami flavour that is perfect for dipping, drizzling, and marinating. Available in the Tomato Sauce aisle today. If you want a burst of flavour, the sweet and tangy taste of Heinz Tomato Ketchup can also be paired with Heinz Mustard to elevate sausage sandwiches, hotdogs and burgers. Packed in a convenient squeezy bottle, it's easy to add to any meal or snack and savour this tomato ketchup's unique flavour.
  • Heinz Tomato Ketchup is the perfect partner for your favourite snack food. It has a smooth and rich consistency that provides a satisfying experience with every dip.

  • It's our sun ripened tomatoes, along with our passion and knowledge that gives our tomato ketchup recipe its unique flavour. No other tomato sauce tastes quite like it.

  • Still using normal tomato sauce? Give Heinz Tomato Ketchup a go and taste the difference.
ingredients: Concentrated Tomatoes (Contains 167g of Tomatoes per 100mL), Sugar, Concentrated Vinegar, Salt, Natural Flavour, Spice. Contains 72% Concentrated Tomatoes.

name: American Mustard Squeezy
long_description:
No burger night, family barbecue, sandwich or hotdog is complete without Heinz American Mustard. This New York style mustard has a mild tang and is made with no artificial colours or flavours. A classic sauces for hot dogs and burgers, Heinz American Mustard is also a tasty dipping sauce for potato wedges and hot chips. It's great with barbecued meats, especially pork ribs, and brings some tangy flavour to sandwiches too. This mustard is mild in flavour so it's sure to be loved by the whole family, no matter if it's used as a dip, spread or marinade.
  • Mild American mustard

  • The perfect condiment for hot dogs and burgers

  • Tasty dip for chips and pretzels

  • No artificial colours

  • No artificial flavours
