name: Soy Sauce Asian Sauces Stir Fry
long_description:
Not only made for sushi, Fountain Soy Sauce tastes excellent with a variety of dishes. With no added flavours, this sauce is perfect for dipping spring rolls and dumplings, or used as a base in a stir fry or noodle dish. Fountain Soy Sauce is a truly versatile condiment and can even be mixed with other ingredients like honey or ginger to create delicious marinades for chicken or beef, easily served with steamed greens and rice. Add to chicken broth for a more asian flavour, then top up with your choice of meat and vegetables and noodles to finish.
  • Versatile condiment for Asian dishes

  • No added flavours

  • The best dipping sauce for sushi, spring rolls and dumplings

  • Great as a base in a stir fry or noodle dish

  • Also tastes great in stir fries and Asian inspired salads

name: Japanese Teriyaki
long_description: Cook a restaurant quality dish in minutes with our easy-to-use sauce kit Simply follow the easy 3-step instructions inside the pack and have a teriyaki dish on the table in just 10 minutes. Inspired by Japanese restaurant versions of the dish, our Japanese Teriyaki kit layers the umami flavours of soy and black vinegar, the nuttiness of sesame and aromatic spices to create a wonderfully savoury-sweet teriyaki sauce. This silky Japanese teriyaki dish is delicious with chicken, beef, prawns or vegetables. If you're looking to level up your teriyaki dish, garnish with pickled ginger, crispy onions or shichimi togarashi seasoning for a final flourish. Our Asian Sauce Kits are easy to use and come tailored with whole spices for distinctive flavour, a base sauce and main sauce. Drawing inspiration from Japanese home cooks and chefs, we have layered the ingredients in our sauces step-by-step to create delicious depth of flavour. Serve this Japanese teriyaki dish with rice, udon noodles or baa buns for a delightful Japanese-inspired meal which promises layers of delicious flavour. If you love Asian-inspired flavours, explore our full Asian Sauce Kits or Asian Curry Kits and try delicious flavours like our Korean BBQ or Japanese Katsu Curry.

name: Indonesian Rendang Curry
description: THE SPICE TAILOR INDONESIAN RENDANG CURRY KIT 275G
long_description:
Rendang is a national treasure normally served at special occasions as it takes hours to cook and create those characteristic deep, rich layers of flavours. Our rendang is so moreish; it is richly flavoured with spices, roasted coconut, browned shallots and balanced with tamarind.

This pack contains a pouch of spices and aromatics, a smaller pouch with our spice paste and a larger one with a coconut sauce.

Spice Routes
A cuisine is a complex tapestry of people, geography and history Early travellers indelibly influenced South East Asian food with their introduction of spices, chillies and curries. New dishes were created and old ones evolved to give us a whole new spectrum of delicious spiced favourites.


At The Spice Tailor, we have been on our own journey down these old spice routes to explore these delicious cuisines. Our old mandate that all our food must taste authentic and be cooked in the same way they are at home still holds. We are really proud to introduce you to our new range of authentic curries!

  • A warming, deep & full bodied dry curry

  • 3 simple steps

  • Ready in 10 minutes

  • No artificial preservatives, colouring or flavourings

  • Suitable for vegetarians

  • Restaurant quality.

  • Chilli Rating: Medium.

name: Tabasco Salsa Picante Sauce
description: MCILHENNY CO TABASCO SALSA PICANTE SAUCE 256ML
long_description:
• TABASCO Salsa Picante is a rich and thick Mexican style hot sauce that features a vibrant spice blend and a subtle kick of heat.
  • The new sauce tastes great on your favorite Tex-Mex dishes like tacos, burritos, and guacamole.
  • Produced by the pepper experts at TABASCO Brand, TABASCO Salsa Picante is made with red jalapenos and quality ingredients.
  • TABASCO Salsa Picante is the latest addition to the brand's new squeeze-bottle line and is designed for easy drizzling, dipping and controlled application of this thicker-style sauce.
  • Mexican Style Hot Sauce

  • Rich and Vibrant

  • Preservative Free

  • Non-GMO

  • Vegan-friendly

  • Gluten free.

  • Kosher.
ingredients: Red jalapeo pepper, water, distilled vinegar, salt, garlic powder, paprika, spices, xanthan gum, TABASCO Brand Pepper Sauce (distilled vinegar, red pepper, salt).

name: Tabasco Pepper Sauce
long_description:
For over 150 years, TABASCO brand Original Red Sauce has been crafted by hand using only three ingredients: aged red peppers, salt, and distilled vinegar. This simple yet distinct recipe creates a pungent flavor that pairs perfectly with almost any cuisine. Original Red is gluten-free, has zero calories, and contains less sodium than other pepper sauces.  The result is a perfectly balanced and flavorful sauce that's sure to satisfy your taste buds. Our slow, artisanal process is carefully managed from seed to sauce on Avery Island, Louisiana.

  • - Tabasco Peppers

  • - Matured to perfection for three glorious years.

  • - Versatile for all cuisines

  • - Making breakfast, lunch and dinner better since 1868

  • - Enhances. Accents. Enlivens

  • - 4/5 heat rating.

  • - Original hot sauce.
ingredients: Distilled Vinegar, Red Pepper (19%), Salt.

name: Hot Sauce
long_description:
Billy's story
Since 1964 Bill has been cooking his 3 day fermented Hot Sauce at home for his family and friends. Using handpicked Australian chillies, the recipe has been perfected with just the right balance of flavour and heat.
Bill's two sons have brought this old family recipe to life in small batches for the first time for everyone to enjoy.
ingredients: Fermented Cayenne Chillies (43%), Water, Sugar, Garlic, Salt, Acidity Regulator (Acetic Acid), Molasses, Fish Sauce, Spice Extract, Thickener (Xanthan Gum), Lemon Extract

Made with Free Range Eggs.
Gluten-Free.
Suitable for Vegetarians.

name: Redhot Original Sauce
long_description:
Frank's RedHot Original Cayenne Pepper Hot Sauce is crafted from 5 simple ingredients starring a premium blend of select aged cayenne peppers that consistently delivers The Perfect Blend of Flavour and Heat. In 1964, it was the secret ingredient in the first Buffalo wings recipe, making Frank's RedHot synonymous with the Buffalo flavour profile. Today, Frank's RedHot Original Cayenne Pepper Sauce is the #1 hot sauce brand in America bringing rich, full-flavour and authentic heat in every bottle. Add a kick of heat and whole lot of flavour to your favourite foods like wings, burgers, buffalo chicken dip, eggs - put that $#!t on everything!
  • Frank's RedHot Original Cayenne Pepper Sauce is crafted with 5 simple ingredients
  • Crafted from real, select, aged red cayenne peppers, Frank's RedHot Original Cayenne Pepper Sauce delivers The Perfect Blend of Flavour and Heat every time
  • Dairy-free, vegetarian, and does not have any gluten containing ingredients
  • Same great recipe since 1964
  • Product of the USA

    Original Buffalo Chicken Wings
    Makes 6 servings Prep time: 5 minutes Cook time: 30 minutes
    INGREDIENTS
    1 1/4 kilograms chicken wing pieces
    1/2 cup (125 ml) FRANK'S RedHot® Original Cayenne Pepper Sauce
    1/3 cup (80 ml) butter, melted
    DIRECTIONS
    BAKE wings in foil-lined pan at 230°C for 30 min. until crispy, turning once.
    COMBINE Frank's RedHot Sauce and butter in bowl.
    TOSS wings in sauce to coat completely. Serve with blue cheese dressing and celery sticksry sticks
ingredients: Aged Cayenne Red Peppers (36%), Distilled Vinegar, Water, Salt, Garlic Powder

Welcome to the sweet (& spicy) life! Our Chilli Jam is jam-packed with tangy tomatoes and PERI-PERI (African Bird's Eye Chillies), it's warm and sweet with a tingle of heat. Perfect for spreading, saucing and dipping. It'll add flavour to just about anything.

Squeeze me on Chicken, Wraps, Sandwiches, Burgers or Halloumi.

name: Hot Chilli Sauce Hot Sauce
long_description:
Turn up the heat with Fountain Hot Chilli Sauce. Made with no artificial colours or flavours, our hot chilli sauce adds a spicy hit to any dish, perfect for barbecues, burgers and wraps. Add some spice to your meals and snacks with Fountain Hot Chilli Sauce. Our Hot Chilli sauce is a spicy and versatile staple for your cupboard, and can be used to top up your BBQ meats and nachos, or a mixed in with delicious stirfrys or combined with sour cream for the ultimate dipping sauce with your wedges. If you're a big sauce lover, don't forget to check out the rest of the Fountain range.
  • Spicy chilli sauce guaranteed to add a kick to dishes

  • No artificial colours

  • No artificial flavours

  • Perfect with barbecues, burgers or wraps

  • Combine with sour cream for a quick dip with a kick

name: Redhot Wings Buffalo Sauce
long_description:
If you're a buffalo hot wings lover, Frank's RedHot Buffalo Wings Sauce is the secret ingredient for heat-and-flavour goodness. We've taken our hot sauce expertise and passion for all things flavourful and created a ready-to-use Buffalo Wings Sauce to fulfill your winged desires.
  • Frank's RedHot Original Buffalo Wings Sauce blends a rich, natural buttery flavour with the signature heat of Frank's RedHot Original for an authentic and consistent buffalo flavour experience
  • Authentic restaurant taste: the perfect blend of flavour and heat in a ready-to-use sauce
  • Frank's RedHot is the secret ingredient used in the original Buffalo wings created in Buffalo, NY in 1964
  • Pour on wings and drumsticks, or use with burgers and dips
  • Dairy-free, vegetarian, and does not have any gluten containing ingredients
  • Product of the USA
  • For over 20 years, Frank's RedHot Original Buffalo Wings Sauce has added craveable bold, spicy flavour to everything from wings to dressings, dips and more

    Frank's Buffalo Chicken Wings
    Makes 6 servings Prep time: 5 minutes Cook time: 30 minutes INGREDIENTS
    1 kg chicken wing pieces
    ¾ - 1 cup (180-250mL) Frank's RedHot® Buffalo Wings Sauce
    DIRECTIONS
    BAKE wings in foil-lined pan at 230°C (210°C fan forced) for 30 minutes or until crispy, turning once.
    TOSS wings in sauce to coat completely. Serve with blue cheese dressing and celery sticks.

name: Sweet Chilli Sauce
long_description:
Fountain Sweet Chilli Sauce is the not-so-secret hero for many Asian dishes. Best known for its pairing with sour cream and wedges, our sweet chilli sauce also tastes great with spring rolls, dumplings, chicken and seafood. With no added colours or flavours, Fountain Sweet Chilli Sauce pairs excellently with a wide range of foods. Add to stir fries, noodle dishes and vegetables, or use as a dip for spring rolls and potato wedges. The options are endless when the sauce tastes this good.
  • Classic sweet chilli flavour

  • No added colours

  • No added flavours

  • Delicious in Asian dishes and stir fries

  • Perfect dipping sauce for spring rolls and potato wedges
ingredients: Sugar, Tomatoes, White Vinegar, Chilli (9%), Capsicum, Garlic Paste, Salt, Maltodextrin (from Maize), Garlic, Maize Thickener (1422), Stabiliser (415).May Contain: Soy, Peanut, Wheat, Gluten.

name: Original Tuna & Beans
long_description:
Sirenas chunk style tuna combined with a mix of hearty legumes. Ideal as a filling snack or added to your salads or rice.

Since 1956, this family owned business has proudly stocked pantries across Australia. Sirena Tuna is made with only the highest quality ingredients, including our premium oil blends and high specification tuna.
Our commitment to sustainability is paramount to our business: 100% of our tuna is pole and line caught. Pole and line is the most sustainable catching method presently available and means catching fish by hand, one at a time.
ingredients: LEGUMES (CHICKPEA, RED KIDNEY BEAN, SOYBEAN AND MUNG BEAN) (37.2%), POLE AND LINE CAUGHT YELLOWFIN TUNA (FISH) (35%), GREEN PEA, OIL (SUNFLOWER SEED AND EXTRA VIRGIN OLIVE OIL), VINEGAR, SUGAR, WATER, SEA SALT, RICE FLOUR, WHITE PEPPER, ONION POWDER, AND NATURAL COLOUR (PAPRIKA OLEORESIN).

name: Tuna In Springwater
long_description:
Sirena Tuna in Springwater,. For purists who love nothing more than the taste of premium quality tuna.

Since 1956, this family owned business has proudly stocked pantries across Australia. Sirena Tuna is made with only the highest quality ingredients, including our premium oil blends and high specification tuna.
Our commitment to sustainability is paramount to our business: 100% of our tuna is pole and line caught. Pole and line is the most sustainable catching method presently available and means catching fish by hand, one at a time.

description: SIRENA TUNA IN OIL ITALIAN STYLE:.:425 GRAM
long_description:
Large, succulent chunks of premium Sirena Tuna in our unique oil blend. Quality you can taste.
Since 1956, this family owned business has proudly stocked pantries across Australia. Sirena Tuna is made with only the highest quality ingredients, including our premium oil blends and high specification tuna.
Our commitment to sustainability is paramount to our business: 100% of our tuna is pole and line caught. Pole and line is the most sustainable catching method presently available and means catching fish by hand, one at a time.

Since 1956, this family owned business has proudly stocked pantries across Australia. Sirena Tuna is made with only the highest quality ingredients, including our premium oil blends and high specification tuna.
Our commitment to sustainability is paramount to our business: 100% of our tuna is pole and line caught. Pole and line is the most sustainable catching method presently available and means catching fish by hand, one at a time.
Nothing Compares.

It's all you would expect from the Seafood Experts.

name: Soy & Ginger Tuna
long_description:
Soy sauce and ginger, a delicious flavour combination to complement our tender tuna chunks.
Since 1956, this family owned business has proudly stocked pantries across Australia for three generations. Sirena Tuna is made with only the highest quality ingredients, including our premium oil blends and high specification tuna.
Our commitment to sustainability is paramount to our business: 100% of our tuna is pole and line caught. Pole and line is the most sustainable catching method presently available and means catching fish by hand, one at a time.
ingredients: Pole & Line Caught Yellowfin Tuna (FISH) (65%), Oil (Sunflower Oil & Extra Virgin Olive Oil) (19%), Soy Sauce (Water, Soybeans, Wheat, and salt) (9.5%) Ginger (6%), Sea Salt.

name: Oil Italian Style In Tuna Slices

long_description:
Finely carved slices of delicious Sirena tuna in premium extra virgin olive oil.
Since 1956, this family owned business has proudly stocked pantries across Australia. Sirena Tuna is made with only the highest quality ingredients, including our premium oil blends and high specification tuna.
Our commitment to sustainability is paramount to our business: 100% of our tuna is pole and line caught. Pole and line is the most sustainable catching method presently available and means catching fish by hand, one at a time.

Nothing Compares.

Edgell® Mixed Vegetables 420g is a blend of Australian grown carrots, potatoes, peas and corn. Edgell® Mixed Vegetables are a great addition to casseroles, quiches and stews. This mix is a convenient way to add some veg to your favourite dishes.

- Aussie Grown
- Source of Fibre
- Great for homemade pies, frittatas and quiches
- Proudly Packed in Australia

Edgell® Mixed Vegetables 420g is a nutritious and flavoursome mix. Simply add the carrots, potatoes, peas and corn mix to classic dishes like stews, casseroles and fish cakes. They also make the perfect addition to homemade pies and pasties. We've taken the hard work out of prepping veg - simply open, drain and add to your dishes!

Edgell® has been a staple in Aussie households for almost 100 years. Today, the majority of our products are proudly made in our Bathurst factory by a dedicated team, committed to providing the best quality products for you to enjoy.

Made with 99.8% fresh Italian tomatoes, harvested and packed within 24 hours

Ideal for both quick weekday meals and slow-simmered recipes

Edgell® has been a staple in Aussie households for almost 100 years. Today, the majority of our products are proudly made in our Bathurst factory by a dedicated team, committed to providing the best quality products for you to enjoy.

name: Polpa Finely Chopped Tomatoes With Basil
description: MUTTI POLPA FINELY CHOPPED TOMATOES WITH BASIL 400G
long_description:
Mutti has been processing tomatoes with passion for over 100 years. Its products are made exclusively of Italian tomatoes, with scrupulous supervision of the entire production chain: from selection of the most suitable varieties to inspection in the field, up to harvesting and canning, which is done just hours after the tomatoes arrive at the plant. 

Mutti Polpa Finely Chopped Tomatoes with Basil are made from 100% Italian tomatoes, harvested at their peak and processed immediately, with care and skill. Red, sweet, ripe and free of green and yellow parts, with all the flavour of fresh tomatoes, with just a pinch of salt and a hint of fresh basil.
ingredients: Tomatoes 98.5%, Basilico Genovese D.O.P. Basil (1.2%), Salt.

name: Australian Grown Sliced Beetroot
long_description:
Add a bold burst of colour and natural sweetness to your dishes with Edgell® Sliced Beetroot 825g. Grown in Australia and carefully sliced before being pickled in brine, this pantry essential delivers both taste and nutrition with ease. Whether you're tossing together a crisp salad, layering a sandwich, or plating up a traditional side, these tender beetroot slices are ready to serve straight from the can. Edgell® Sliced Beetroot not only enhances flavour but also supports a wholesome, balanced diet. Ideal for burgers, wraps, and more, it's a flavour-packed favourite in any kitchen.

- 100% Australian grown and produced
- Naturally low in fat
- Deep, rich taste and vibrant colour
- Proudly packed in Bathurst, New South Wales

For nearly 100 years, Edgell® has been a trusted name in Australian households. Today, the majority of our products are still made in our Bathurst facility, where a dedicated team works passionately to bring you the highest quality vegetables for your family to enjoy.
ingredients: Beetroot (61%), water, sugar, food acid (acetic), salt.

name: Australian Grown Diced Capsicum
long_description:
Bring vibrant colour and bold, sweet flavor to your cooking with Edgell® Diced Capsicum 125g -a convenient, pantry-ready solution for adding a touch of flavour to your meals year-round. Whether you're whipping up a quick weeknight stir-fry, layering flavors in a slow-cooked stew, or adding brightness to a hearty pasta sauce, Edgell® Diced Capsicum is a time-saving kitchen essential.

Try them stirred into scrambled eggs for a colourful breakfast, folded into taco fillings for extra zest, or added to rice pilafs, casseroles, and soups for a sweet-savory depth that elevates every bite. With vibrant taste and effortless versatility, Edgell® Diced Capsicum makes it easy to cook with colour, no matter the season.

- Australian Grown
- Proudly packed in Bathurst, New South Whales.

For nearly a century, Edgell® has been a trusted staple in Australian homes. Today, most of our products are proudly crafted in our Bathurst factory by a passionate team, dedicated to delivering the highest quality products for you and your family to enjoy.

name: Peas Corn & Carrots
long_description:
Edgell® Peas, Corn and Carrots 420g brings together three classic veggies in one easy, ready-to-enjoy can - tender green peas, sweet corn, and colourful carrots. Harvested and packed at peak freshness, this vibrant mix is a go-to side that adds a comforting, homestyle touch to any meal.

Perfect for quick weeknight dinners or casual entertaining, Edgell® Peas, Corn and Carrots are ready in minutes - just heat and serve with grilled meats, roasts, or fish. They also make a great base for hearty soups, stews, and casseroles, or can be served cold in a nostalgic salad with creamy dressing.

No chopping, no hassle - just wholesome flavour and the trusted quality you expect from Edgell®. Keep a can or two in your pantry for easy, nutritious meals anytime.

- A good source of fibre
- Proudly grown and packed in Australia

For nearly a century, Edgell® has been a trusted name in Australian kitchens. Today, most of our range is still proudly produced in our Bathurst facility by a passionate team committed to delivering top-quality vegetables for Aussie families.
ingredients: Vegetables (60%) (peas, corn, carrot), water, sugar, salt.

name: Polpa Finely Chopped Tomatoes With Garlic
description: MUTTI POLPA FINELY CHOPPED TOMATOES WITH GARLIC 400G
long_description:
Mutti has been processing tomatoes with passion for over 100 years. Its products are made exclusively of Italian tomatoes, with scrupulous supervision of the entire production chain: from selection of the most suitable varieties to inspection in the field, up to harvesting and canning, which is done just hours after the tomatoes arrive at the plant. 

Mutti Polpa Finely Chopped Tomatoes with Garlic are made from 100% Italian tomatoes, harvested at their peak and processed immediately, with care and skill. Red, sweet, ripe and free of green and yellow parts, with all the flavour of fresh tomatoes, with just a pinch of salt and a hint of garlic.

name: Peas & Carrots
long_description:
Enjoy the perfect pairing of garden-fresh flavour with Edgell® Peas and Carrots 420g - a colourful blend of tender peas and sweet carrots, picked at peak freshness and packed for convenience. This classic combo brings warmth and simplicity to your table, making it an easy go-to for busy weeknights or relaxed weekend meals.

No chopping, peeling, or prep required - just heat and serve. Whether you're plating up with grilled meats, roasting a Sunday dinner, or tossing into soups and casseroles, Edgell® Peas and Carrots deliver wholesome taste in every bite. They're also great chilled in a nostalgic salad with creamy dressing for a retro twist.



- Good source of fibre

- Packed in Australia with care


Edgell® has been a staple in Aussie households for almost 100 years. Today, the majority of our products are proudly made in our Bathurst factory by a dedicated team, committed to providing the best quality products for you to enjoy.

name: Australian Grown Chickpeas Snack Packs 4x125g
description: EDGELL AUSTRALIAN GROWN CHICKPEAS SNACK PACKS 125G 4 PACK
long_description:
Hearty, wholesome, and endlessly versatile, Edgell® Chickpeas 125g are perfect for everyday meals and creative kitchen adventures. These naturally creamy legumes boast a mild, nutty flavor that makes them a staple in cuisines around the world-from Mediterranean and Middle Eastern to Indian and Latin American dishes. Whether you're whipping up a classic hummus, adding body to a vegetable curry, or tossing them into a crisp salad for extra protein and texture, Edgell® Chickpeas are a delicious and satisfying addition to any plate.

Ready to eat and easy to use, our chickpeas save you hours in the kitchen-simply drain, heat, and serve. For a quick snack, roast them with olive oil and your favorite spices until crispy. Or blend with lemon juice, garlic, and tahini for a smooth, homemade hummus that's perfect for dipping or spreading. However, you enjoy them, Edgell® Chickpeas bring hearty nutrition and satisfying flavor to every meal.

- Australian Grown
- Proudly packed in Australia

For nearly a century, Edgell® has been a trusted staple in Australian homes. Today, most of our products are proudly crafted in our Bathurst factory by a passionate team, dedicated to delivering the highest quality products for you and your family to enjoy.

name: Edamame Beans Ready To Eat 125g
description: EDGELL EDAMAME BEANS READY TO EAT 125G 4 PACK
long_description:
Edgell® Edamame Beans 125g are ready to enjoy whenever you need a quick and tasty addition to your meal. These beans are lightly cooked and preserved to retain their naturally nutty flavor and satisfyingly firm texture.

No peeling or prep needed-simply open, drain, and serve. They're a perfect go-to ingredient for everything from stir-fries and salads to grain bowls and poke-inspired dishes. You can even warm them with a touch of sea salt for a simple, savory snack that's as comforting as it is convenient.

Subtly sweet and earthy, Edgell® Edamame beans pair beautifully with ginger, soy sauce, sesame, or citrus-based dressings. Try blending them into a dip with olive oil, garlic, and lemon for an easy appetizer, or toss them into a noodle bowl for added colour and bite.

- Great as a snack on the go
- Delicious in a stir fry

Edgell® has been a staple in Aussie households for almost 100 years. Today, the majority of our products are proudly made in our Bathurst factory by a dedicated team, committed to providing the best quality products for you to enjoy.

name: Snack Time Chick Peas With Olive Oil & Seasalt
description: EDGELL SNACK CANS CHICK PEAS OLIVE OIL SEA SALT 70G
long_description:
Snack smarter with Edgell® Chickpeas with Olive Oil & Sea Salt 70g-a deliciously satisfying, ready-to-eat option that delivers on taste in every bite. Made with Edgell® Chickpeas, a drizzle of aromatic olive oil, and a pinch of sea salt, this snack offers the perfect balance of creamy texture, savory flavor and natural goodness. Whether you're on the go, at your desk, or simply looking for a better-for-you alternative to processed snacks, Edgell® has you covered with a nourishing option that doesn't compromise on taste.

Enjoy them straight from the pack, toss them into a salad for added texture and protein, or pair with hummus and crackers for a Mediterranean-inspired snack plate. Perfectly portioned and ready when you are, Edgell® Chickpeas with Olive Oil & Sea Salt are your go-to for delicious and convenient snacking.

- Source of Fibre
- Source of Protein
- No Added Sugar
- No drain

For nearly a century, Edgell® has been a trusted staple in Australian homes. Today, most of our products are proudly crafted in our Bathurst factory by a passionate team, dedicated to delivering the highest quality products for you and your family to enjoy.
ingredients: Cooked chick peas (71%), olive oil (15%), water, sea salt (0.6%).

name: Polpa Tomatoes Finely Chopped
long_description:
Only Italian tomatoes: red, sweet, ripe and free of yellow and green parts. That's why Mutti Finely Chopped Tomatoes are different from the first glance: thick, inviting and fragrant. The pleasure continues with the first taste: all the delicate flavor of fresh tomatoes. 

Mutti has been processing tomatoes with passion for over 100 years. Its products are made exclusively of Italian tomatoes, with scrupulous supervision of the entire production chain: from selection of the most suitable varieties to inspection in the field, up to harvesting and canning, which is done just hours after tomatoes arrive at the plant.

  • 99.8% ripe tomatoes and a pinch of salt

  • Picked and packed in 24 hours for maximum freshness
ingredients: Tomatoes 99.8%, Salt - Only Italian tomatoes.

name: Beans Red Kidney
long_description:
• 5-star health rating
  • Good source of fibre
  • Source of protein


Clear the pantry stage for these rich, red, Italian kidney beans. A can of protein goodness calling to be sauced by your warm homey classics like Chilli Con Carne and Rajma Curry, or topped with cheese in a pot of deluxe vegetarian nachos. Filled with fibre, our Coles Red Kidney Beans have a 5 Health Star Rating and will never go astray in a well-rounded daily diet. With no artificial colours or preservatives, you can rest assured the ingredients of this 420g can are simple as they come - beans, beans and more beans (safely packed into water and salt for longer-term pantry stays).


Snap open a can and boil for a minimum of 10 minutes, for best eating. Or, cook them slowly in your favourite simmer sauce.

long_description:
Add colour and sweetness to your meals with Edgell® Baby Peas and Corn 420g. Featuring tender peas and golden corn kernels, Edgell® Baby Peas and Corn mix is a convenient way to enjoy two family favourites in one. Packed at peak freshness, these vegetables retain their natural flavour, vibrant colour and essential nutrients - perfect for busy weeknight dinners or quick side dishes.

Whether you're tossing them into a stir-fry, mixing them through rice or pasta, or serving as a side, this combo delivers on both taste and versatility.

- Source of Fibre
- Naturally low in fat
- Australian made
- Proudly packed in Bathurst, New South Wales.

For nearly a century, Edgell® has been a trusted staple in Australian homes. Today, most of our products are proudly crafted in our Bathurst factory by a passionate team, dedicated to delivering the highest quality products for you and your family to enjoy.

name: Cannellini Beans
long_description:
Mild, creamy, and wonderfully versatile, Edgell® Cannellini Beans 400g are a must-have for any well-stocked kitchen. Edgell® Butter Beans are prized for their delicate flavor and tender-yet-firm texture, making them perfect for adding heartiness and subtle earthiness to a wide range of dishes. Whether you're crafting a traditional Tuscan soup, building a Mediterranean-inspired salad, or creating a satisfying vegetarian stew, Edgell® Cannellini Beans provide a nourishing, satisfying base that soaks up flavor beautifully.

For a simple serving suggestion, sauté Edgell® Cannellini Beans with garlic, rosemary, and olive oil for a rustic Italian side dish, or mash them into a creamy spread with lemon and herbs for a delicious twist on traditional hummus. However you enjoy them, Edgell® Cannellini Beans bring comfort, nutrition, and versatility to every bite.

- Naturally low in fat
- Source of Fibre
- Versatile ingredient

For nearly a century, Edgell® has been a trusted staple in Australian homes. Today, most of our products are proudly crafted in our Bathurst factory by a passionate team, dedicated to delivering the highest quality products for you and your family to enjoy.
ingredients: Cannellini beans (60%), water, salt, antioxidant (ascorbic acid), firming agent (509).

name: Snack Time Chick Peas With Zesty Vinaigrette
description: EDGELL SNACK CANS CHICKPEA ZESTY VINAIGRETTE 70G
long_description:
Bright, bold, and bursting with flavor, Edgell® Chickpeas with Zesty Vinaigrette 70g are your go-to snack when you want something wholesome with a tangy twist. Edgell® Chickpeas are marinated in a vibrant vinaigrette, creating a perfectly balanced bite that's fresh, flavorful, and satisfyingly savory. Whether you're powering through your workday or reaching for a better-for-you snack on the move, this convenient can delivers taste and nutrition in every mouthful.

- Source of Protein
- Source of Fibre
- No drain

Enjoy them straight from the pack, toss over leafy greens for an instant salad upgrade, or serve as part of a mezze platter with olives and grilled vegetables. Edgell® Chickpeas with Zesty Vinaigrette are a fresh, fuss-free way to snack well-delivering real ingredients, real flavor, and real satisfaction.

Edgell® has been a staple in Aussie households for almost 100 years. Today, the majority of our products are proudly made in our Bathurst factory by a dedicated team, committed to providing the best quality products for you to enjoy.
ingredients: Cooked chick peas (71%), water, sunflower oil, vinegar (3%), spices (chilli, celery, black pepper, cumin), sugar, garlic, food acid (citric), parsley (0.2%), salt, lemon juice concentrate (0.05%).

name: Polpa Tomatoes Finely Chopped
long_description:
Only Italian tomatoes: red, sweet, ripe and free of yellow and green parts. That's why Mutti Finely Chopped Tomatoes are different from the first glance: thick, inviting and fragrant. The pleasure continues with the first taste: all the delicate flavor of fresh tomatoes. 

Mutti has been processing tomatoes with passion for over 100 years. Its products are made exclusively of Italian tomatoes, with scrupulous supervision of the entire production chain: from selection of the most suitable varieties to inspection in the field, up to harvesting and canning, which is done just hours after tomatoes arrive at the plant. 
  • 99.8% ripe tomatoes and a pinch of salt

  • Picked and packed in 24 hours for maximum freshness

name: Sliced Beetroot
long_description:
Sliced and ready to eat, Golden Circle Sliced Beetroot adds the perfect flavour to burgers, sandwiches, dips and salads. It contains no added colours, is naturally low in fat (when drained) and provides 2.5 vegie serves per can (One serve of vegetables = 75g. Aim for a variety of vegetables each day.) A versatile ingredient for cooking, Golden Circle Sliced Beetroot is tasty both hot and cold. Blend with chickpeas to make a beetroot hummus or bake into homemade vegie chips for a delicious snack. You don't have to always go savoury with beetroot either, it tastes great in cakes and muffins as well. Golden Circle, Share the Sunshine.
  • No added colours

  • 2.5 vegie serves per can (One serve of vegetables = 75g. Aim for a variety of vegetables each day.)

  • Beetroot is naturally low in fat (when drained)

  • Versatile ingredient for sweet and savoury recipes

  • Conveniently canned and ready to use
ingredients: Beetroot (62%), Water, Sugar, Food Acid (Acetic Acid), Salt, Herb & Spice Flavours.

name: Mexican Mix With Black Beans Pinto Beans And Red Kidney Beans
description: EDGELL MEXICAN MIX WITH BLACK BEANS- PINTO BEANS AND RED KIDNEY BEANS 400G
long_description:
Edgell® Mexican Mix 400g is a delicious blend of black beans, pinto beans and red kidney beans. A must have pantry staple for cooking your favourite Mexican dishes. These beans work perfectly as a filling in burritos and tacos, or you could even add to nachos and chilli dishes for extra flavour and nutrients.

- High in Fibre
- Great as a burrito or taco filling
- Proudly packed in Australia

Edgell® Mexican Mix is the perfect way to boost your Mexican dishes with added fibre. Perfect for soups, salads and enchiladas. This convenient blend will save you time in the kitchen, so that you can get dinner on the table even quicker!

Edgell® has been a staple in Aussie households for almost 100 years. Today, the majority of our products are proudly made in our Bathurst factory by a dedicated team, committed to providing the best quality products for you to enjoy.
ingredients: Legumes (60%) (black beans, pinto beans, red kidney beans), water, sugar, salt, firming agent (509), food acid (acetic acid).

name: Corn Kernels 125g
long_description:
Savour the crisp texture and naturally sweet flavour of golden corn any time of year with Edgell® Corn Kernels 4x125g. Harvested at their peak and packed for freshness, these kernels offer a quick and easy way to boost your meals with veggies - without sacrificing taste or nutrition. Whether you're tossing them into salads, stir-fries, casseroles or soups, Edgell® Corn Kernels deliver reliable quality and flavour every time.

Ideal for busy kitchens, this pantry must-have needs no prep - just open, drain, and stir into your favourite recipes. They're also perfect as a speedy side or mixed into rice, pasta, or taco fillings.

- Good source of fibre
- Grown in Australia
- Great for soups, stews, fried rice and casseroles
- Proudly packed in Australia

For nearly 100 years, Edgell® has been a trusted name in Australian homes. Today, most of our range is still proudly made in our Bathurst facility, where our passionate team is committed to delivering top-quality products for you and your family.

name: Instant Mashed Plain Potato
long_description:
When you're busy, time is of the essence. Making a yummy mashed potato to accompany your meal usually takes time. Not with Continental - Deb Instant Mashed Potato lets you make a deliciously smooth and creamy mash without the fuss. Deb potato mash comes in an easy-to-use packet and is always a great addition to any meal; keep a couple in your pantry so it's ready when you are.Be surprised by what's possible with Continental's Deb range, providing endless possibilities straight from your pantry. Use them to create a wide range of mouth-watering meals today. Spice up fish pie with our easy recipe for curried fish pie, whip up a simple potato and tomato bake or visit our website to find a range of other delicious recipes.At Continental, we love food the way you do. We know how much you value good, nutritious, flavourful food and real authentic home cooking. It feels good to cook and even better to bring pleasure to the ones you love through the food you put on the table. For 70 years now, our chefs have combined their expertise, love of flavour and only the finest ingredients to help you create great-tasting meals every day.
  • Continental Deb Instant Mashed Potato is a quick and easy way to bring a delicious side dish to life

  • Deliciously smooth and creamy mashed potato without the fuss

  • Ready in an instant - just add boiling water, let stand for 30 seconds, stir and dig in!

  • Deb Instant Mashed Potato is made in Australia

  • Boasting a crowd-pleasing taste, it's great on its own or as a base for hearty meals

  • At Continental, we go to extraordinary lengths in pursuit of great flavour because we know it means a tastier meal for you and your family.

name: Brown Lentils
long_description:
Nutritious, filling, and incredibly versatile, Edgell® Brown Lentils 400g are a simple way to boost your meals with plant-based goodness. Edgell® Brown Lentils are ready to use straight from the can-no soaking, boiling or prep time required. Whether you're creating comforting curries, vibrant salads, hearty soups or vegetarian patties, Edgell® Brown Lentils are the perfect ingredient to support a balanced, healthy diet.

Mild in flavour with a soft-yet-firm texture, Edgell® Brown Lentils easily absorb spices and sauces, making them a staple in cuisines from the Mediterranean to South Asia. They're a great meat alternative for anyone following a vegetarian, vegan or flexitarian diet and a natural way to add fibre to your everyday meals.

- Source of Fibre
- Source of Protein

For nearly a century, Edgell® has been a trusted staple in Australian homes. Today, most of our products are proudly crafted in our Bathurst factory by a passionate team, dedicated to delivering the highest quality products for you and your family to enjoy.

long_description:
Looking for a quick, tasty, and wholesome snack? Edgell® Snack Time Black Beans, Capsicum & Charred Corn with Zesty Salsa is ready to eat with no draining required. Your go-to solution for a satisfying work lunch or snack when you're in a pinch or want something delicious and nutritious to eat! This ready-to-eat snack combines hearty black beans, charred corn and vibrant capsicum, all tossed in a tangy, zesty salsa that adds a delicious kick to every bite.

Perfect for busy lifestyles, Edgell® Snack Time Black Beans, Capsicum & Charred Corn with Zesty Salsa is ideal for lunchboxes, desk drawers, or post-workout snacking. It contains no added sugar and no artificial colours or flavours. Enjoy on its own or serve with cooked rice for an easy lunch on a busy weekday.

- No drain

For nearly a century, Edgell® has been a trusted staple in Australian homes. Today, most of our products are proudly crafted in our Bathurst factory by a passionate team, dedicated to delivering the highest quality products for you and your family to enjoy.

name: Chick Peas
long_description:
• 5 Health Star Rating
  • Good source of fibre
  • A source of protein


Here, we present a deconstructed hummus, a favourite among vegans our humble Coles Chick Peas. In a can, no less.


Inside said can, you'll find just 3 things: Chick peas, water and salt along with a good dose of fibre and protein. Our favourite ways to enjoy the modest chick pea is in a Turkish chick pea stew or, lightly flavoured the Greek way - with oil, lemon juice, parsley, salt, cumin, garlic and black pepper. Try them as a side to a Greek baked fish dish or tossed through a Mediterranean salad or mezze platter with Dolmas, Tzatziki and eggplant.


An ingredient that can truly chameleon to suit any meal, its long-life nature makes for easy storing, a must-have for the pantry. Whether it's Indian curries, beloved Turkish dishes or Mediterranean delights, Coles Chick Peas are always ready.

name: Beans 4 Bean Mix No Added Salt
long_description:
Edgell® No Added Salt Four Bean Mix 400g is a pantry essential with endless possibilities, Edgell Four Bean Mix is a vibrant, ready-to-use blend of kidney beans, chickpeas, lima beans, and butter beans-carefully selected for quality and taste. Each can brings together four distinct textures and flavours to create a hearty base or colourful side dish in minutes.

With no soaking required, this bean mix is ideal for busy weeknights or easy meal prepping. Simply open, rinse, and toss into your favourite recipes. From zesty Mexican burrito bowls to Mediterranean salads and warming stews, Edgell® Four Bean Mix delivers natural flavour and satisfying substance to every bite.

The combination of beans adds a wholesome richness to soups and casseroles, or can be enjoyed cold in a light vinaigrette with cherry tomatoes, red onion, and fresh herbs for a quick, refreshing salad. You can even mash and season them for a rustic dip or spread-great with crackers or veggie sticks.

- No Added Salt
- Source of Protein
- Source of Fibre
- Proudly packed in Australia

Edgell® has been a staple in Aussie households for almost 100 years. Today, the majority of our products are proudly made in our Bathurst factory by a dedicated team, committed to providing the best quality products for you to enjoy.

name: Australian Grown Sliced Beetroot
long_description:
Add a vibrant splash of colour and earthy sweetness to your meals with Edgell® Sliced Beetroot 225g. Made from Australian grown beets, expertly sliced and pickled in brine, this pantry staple brings flavour and nutrition to your plate with zero fuss. Whether you're building a fresh salad, stacking sandwiches, or serving as a classic side, these tender slices are ready to enjoy straight from the can. Edgell® Sliced Beetroot not only adds a delicious taste but also contributes to a healthy, balanced diet. Perfect on burgers, sandwiches and wraps, Edgell® Sliced Beetroot is flavourful staple in any kitchen.

- Australian grown
- Naturally low in fat
- Rich flavour and colour
- Proudly packed in Bathurst, New South Wales.


For nearly a century, Edgell® has been a trusted staple in Australian homes. Today, most of our products are proudly crafted in our Bathurst factory by a passionate team, dedicated to delivering the highest quality products for you and your family to enjoy.

name: Australian Diced Tomatoes
long_description:
Leggo's Diced Tomatoes are made with 100% Australian grown tomatoes, ensuring a fresh, high-quality product that is perfect for a wide range of recipes.

Free from preservatives, artificial colours, and flavours, Leggo's diced tomatoes offer a pure and natural option for your cooking needs. Suitable for vegans and vegetarians, they are a versatile pantry staple, allowing you to create delicious, wholesome dishes with ease. Whether you're making a rich tomato sauce, adding depth to soups, or enhancing the flavour of casseroles, Leggo's Diced Tomatoes are the ideal base for your culinary creations.

- Made in Australia with Australian grown tomatoes
- No Artificial colours or flavours
- No added preservatives
- 4.5 Health Star Rating
- Suitable for vegans and vegetarians

When it comes to Italian food, Aussies love to do it their way - Leggo's are here to celebrate Aussie twists on classic Italian recipes! Leggo's has been Australian made with quality ingredients for over 130 years - It's How We Do Italian.

name: Super Sweet Corn Kernels
long_description:
Enjoy the crisp, naturally sweet taste of golden corn all year round with Edgell® Super Sweet Corn Kernels 420g. Packed at peak freshness, Edgell® Super Sweet Corn Kernels are a convenient way to add vegetables to your meals without compromising on taste or nutrition. Whether you're making salads, stir-fries, casseroles, or hearty soups, Edgell® Super Sweet Corn Kernels will deliver consistent quality and flavour every time.

Perfect for busy households, this pantry essential requires no preparation-just open, drain, and add to your favorite dishes. It's also a great option for quick side servings or mixing into rice, pasta, and taco fillings.

- Source of Fibre
- Australian grown

name: Beans 4 Bean Mix
long_description:
Edgell® Four Bean Mix 400g is a pantry essential with endless possibilities. Edgell® Four Bean Mix is a vibrant, ready-to-use blend of kidney beans, chickpeas, lima beans, and butter beans-carefully selected for quality and taste. Each can brings together four distinct textures and flavours to create a hearty base or colourful side dish in minutes.

With no soaking required, this bean mix is ideal for busy weeknights or easy meal prepping. Simply open, rinse, and toss into your favourite recipes. From zesty Mexican burrito bowls to Mediterranean salads and warming stews, Edgell® Four Bean Mix delivers natural flavour and satisfying substance to every bite.

The combination of beans adds a wholesome richness to soups and casseroles, or can be enjoyed cold in a light vinaigrette with cherry tomatoes, red onion, and fresh herbs for a quick, refreshing salad. You can even mash and season them for a rustic dip or spread-great with crackers or veggie sticks.

- Source of Protein
- Source of Fibre
- Proudly packed in Australia

Edgell® has been a staple in Aussie households for almost 100 years. Today, the majority of our products are proudly made in our Bathurst factory by a dedicated team, committed to providing the best quality products for you to enjoy.

name: Beetroot Sliced
long_description:
Sliced and ready to eat, Golden Circle Sliced Beetroot adds the perfect flavour to burgers, sandwiches, dips and salads. It contains no added colours, is naturally low in fat (when drained) and provides 1 vegie serve per can (One serve of vegetables = 75g. Aim for a variety of vegetables each day). A versatile ingredient for cooking, Golden Circle Sliced Beetroot is tasty cold or warm. Blend with chickpeas to make hummus or even bake into homemade vegie chips. You don't have to always go savoury with beetroot either, it's great in cakes and muffins as well. Golden Circle, Share the Sunshine.
  • No added colours

  • 1 vegie serve per can* (One serve of vegetables = 75g. Aim for a variety or vegetables each day.)

  • Beetroot is naturally low in fat (when drained)

  • Versatile ingredient for savoury recipes and even desserts

  • Conveniently canned, ready to use for cooking

long_description:
Bring a lively pop of colour and a touch of natural sweetness to your favourite dishes with Edgell® Sweet Sliced Beetroot 425g. Grown right here in Australia, these beets are carefully sliced and preserved in a tangy brine, making them a convenient and nutritious addition to your pantry. Whether you're tossing them into a salad, layering them in a sandwich, or plating them as a side, these tender slices are ready to enjoy straight from the tin. Not only do they taste great, but they also support a healthy, balanced lifestyle. From burgers to wraps, Edgell® Sweet Sliced Beetroot is a go-to ingredient for everyday meals.

- Grown and made in Australia
- Naturally low in fat
- Bold taste and vibrant colour
- Packed with care in Bathurst, New South Wales

For close to 100 years, Edgell® has been a trusted name in Australian kitchens. Today, most of our range is proudly produced in our Bathurst facility, where a dedicated team works hard to bring you the best in quality and flavour for your family to enjoy.

name: Australian Crushed Tomatoes
long_description:
Leggo's Crushed Tomatoes are made with 100% Australian grown tomatoes, ensuring a fresh, high-quality product that is perfect for a wide range of recipes.

Free from preservatives, artificial colours, and flavours, Leggo's crushed tomatoes offer a pure and natural option for your cooking needs. Suitable for vegans and vegetarians, they are a versatile pantry staple, allowing you to create delicious, wholesome dishes with ease. Whether you're making a rich tomato sauce, adding depth to soups, or enhancing the flavour of casseroles, Leggo's Crushed Tomatoes are the ideal base for your culinary creations.

When it comes to Italian food, Aussies love to do it their way - Leggo's are here to celebrate Aussie twists on classic Italian recipes! Leggo's has been Australian made with quality ingredients for over 130 years - It's How We Do Italian.

name: Creamed Corn
long_description:
- A source of fibre

- No added preservatives

- True family favourite

- Great for making corn fritters


A versatile ingredient, Edgell® Creamed Corn contains no added preservatives. Perfect for creamed corn fritters and chicken and corn soup.


Edgell® Creamed Corn has been picked and puréed for convenience. Enjoy as the familiar side dish or get creative by baking in the oven with cheese.


Edgell® Creamed Corn is full of flavour. Spread on toast for a low-fat treat or whip up some tasty homemade corn fritters. This creamed corn is low in fat and a source of fibre.


Edgell has been bringing corn to Australian families for generations. We pride ourselves on bringing you great quality vegetables. Due to a shortage of Australian corn, our 420g products currently are being sourced both from trusted and reputable farmers overseas from Thailand, and also Australian grown corn as well. Rest assured we will bring you Australian grown corn again as soon as we can. The products are labelled with: "Made in Thailand." or "Made in Australia from 97% Australian ingredients."
ingredients: Sweet corn (58%), water, thickener (1412), sugar, salt.

long_description:
Rich in flavour and beautifully deep in colour, Edgell® Red Kidney Beans 400g are a versatile pantry staple perfect for adding heartiness and depth to your favourite meals. Carefully cooked and ready to use straight from the can, these beans have a firm texture and a slightly nutty taste that holds up beautifully in both slow-cooked dishes and quick weeknight meals.

From spicy Mexican chili to fragrant Indian curries or bold vegetarian burrito bowls, Edgell® Red Kidney Beans are a go-to ingredient for bringing richness and balance to your cooking. Simply rinse and stir them through soups, stews, or rice dishes for an instant boost of flavour and substance. They're also a great addition to salads-paired with corn, tomato, and fresh herbs-or mashed with spices for a tasty bean dip or burger patty base.

- Source of Protein
- Proudly Packed in Australia

Convenient, reliable, and delicious, Edgell® Red Kidney Beans are a must-have for everyday cooking.

Edgell® has been a staple in Aussie households for almost 100 years. Today, the majority of our products are proudly made in our Bathurst factory by a dedicated team, committed to providing the best quality products for you to enjoy.

Expertly cooked and canned to lock in their rich taste and soft texture, these beans are a natural source of fibre and ideal for a variety of diets - from vegan and vegetarian to flexitarian.

name: Sliced Beetroot
long_description:
Sliced and ready to eat, Golden Circle Sliced Beetroot adds the perfect tang to burgers, sandwiches, dips and salads. It contains no added colours, is naturally low in fat (when drained) and provides 5.5 vegie serves per can (One serve of vegetables = 75g. Aim for a variety of vegetables each day.). A versatile ingredient for cooking, Golden Circle Sliced Beetroot is tasty cold or warm. Blend with chickpeas to make hummus or even bake into homemade vegie chips. You don't have to always go savoury with beetroot either, it's great in cakes and muffins as well. Golden Circle, Share the Sunshine.
  • No added colours

  • 5.5 vegie serves per can (One serve of vegetables = 75g. Aim for a variety or vegetables each day.)

  • Beetroot is naturally low in fat (when drained)

  • Sliced and ready to eat

  • Beetroot slices are perfect for adding to burgers or sandwiches

name: Seed Beans Four Bean Mix 4 Pack
description: EDGELL SEED BEANS 4 PACK:FOUR BEAN MIX:.:500 GRAM
long_description:
Edgell® Four Bean Mix 125g is a pantry essential with endless possibilities. Edgell® Four Bean Mix is a vibrant, ready-to-use blend of kidney beans, chickpeas, lima beans, and butter beans carefully selected for quality and taste. Each can brings together four distinct textures and flavours to create a hearty base or colourful side dish in minutes.

With no soaking required, this bean mix is ideal for busy weeknights or easy meal prepping. Simply open, rinse, and toss into your favourite recipes. From zesty Mexican burrito bowls to Mediterranean salads and warming stews, Edgell® Four Bean Mix delivers natural flavour and satisfying substance to every bite.

The combination of beans adds a wholesome richness to soups and casseroles, or can be enjoyed cold in a light vinaigrette with cherry tomatoes, red onion, and fresh herbs for a quick, refreshing salad. You can even mash and season them for a rustic dip or spread-great with crackers or veggie sticks.

- Source of Protein
- Source of Fibre
- Proudly packed in Australia

Edgell® has been a staple in Aussie households for almost 100 years. Today, the majority of our products are proudly made in our Bathurst factory by a dedicated team, committed to providing the best quality products for you to enjoy.
ingredients: Legumes (60%) (butter beans, chick peas, red kidney beans (small red variety), baby lima beans), water, sugar, salt, firming agent (509), food acid (acetic acid).

Try roasting a tray of Golden Circle Baby Beetroot with baby carrots, onion and rosemary, or adding them to a salad with goat's cheese and rocket. These mini beets are naturally low in fat (when drained) and each can contains 3 vegie serves (One serve of vegetables = 75g. Aim for a variety of vegetables each day). Golden Circle, Share the Sunshine.

long_description:
Enjoy the crisp, naturally sweet taste of golden corn all year round with Edgelll® Corn Kernels 420g. Packed at peak freshness, Corn Kernels are a convenient way to add vegetables to your meals without compromising on taste or nutrition. Whether you're making salads, stir-fries, casseroles, or hearty soups, Edgell® Corn Kernels will deliver consistent quality and flavor every time.

Perfect for busy households, this pantry essential requires no preparation-just open, drain, and add to your favorite dishes. It's also a great option for quick side servings or mixing into rice, pasta and taco fillings.

- Source of Fibre
- Australian grown
- Perfect ingredient for casseroles, fried rice, soups and stews
- Proudly packed in Bathurst, New South Wales.

For nearly a century, Edgell® has been a trusted staple in Australian homes. Today, most of our products are proudly crafted in our Bathurst factory by a passionate team, dedicated to delivering the highest quality products for you and your family to enjoy.

Whether you're cooking a family favourite or creating a new twist on a classic dish, Edgell® Garden Peas add a burst of goodness to every bite.

Edgell® Garden Peas are ready to heat and serve, saving you time without sacrificing quality. They're a reliable, no-fuss ingredient to keep in your pantry- ideal for everything from simple sides to hearty pies, pastas, and risottos. Add them to stir-fries for a touch of sweetness, blend into soups for a velvety finish, or toss with mint and lemon for a fresh, flavourful salad.

Proudly Packed in Australia

name: Australian Grown Chick Peas
long_description:
Hearty, wholesome, and endlessly versatile, Edgell® Chickpeas 400g are perfect for everyday meals and creative kitchen adventures. These naturally creamy legumes boast a mild, nutty flavor that makes them a staple in cuisines around the world-from Mediterranean and Middle Eastern to Indian and Latin American dishes. Whether you're whipping up a classic hummus, adding body to a vegetable curry, or tossing them into a crisp salad for extra protein and texture, Edgell® Chickpeas are a delicious and satisfying addition to any plate.

Ready to eat and easy to use, our chickpeas save you hours in the kitchen-simply drain, heat, and serve. For a quick snack, roast them with olive oil and your favorite spices until crispy. Or blend with lemon juice, garlic, and tahini for a smooth, homemade hummus that's perfect for dipping or spreading. However, you enjoy them, Edgell® Chickpeas bring hearty nutrition and satisfying flavor to every meal.

- Australian Grown
- Proudly packed in Australia

For nearly a century, Edgell® has been a trusted staple in Australian homes. Today, most of our products are proudly crafted in our Bathurst factory by a passionate team, dedicated to delivering the highest quality products for you and your family to enjoy.
ingredients: Chick peas (60%), water, salt.

Our beloved Coles Corn Kernels - sweet and juicy, crisp and fresh. Their the perfect company in summer salads and equally delicious warmed up, in your winter casseroles and soups. We know, it's just corn, but the versatility of these easy-to-use, easy-to-store, wallet-friendly vegetables has us thinking - they ought to be a staple in everyone's pantry. We all love taco Tuesday and our Coles Corn Kernels are no different, ready to add a burst of natural sweetness to your favourite Mexican taste sensations.


The humble corn kernal is not only more versatile than corn on a cob, but more kid-friendly too. With a 5 Health Star Rating, our Coles Corn Kernels are an easy choice and make for many fun family meals like corn fritters or Chatpata corn.

name: Baked Beans In Tomato Sauce Beans
description: HEINZ BAKED BEANS IN TOMATO SAUCE BEANS 3 PACK
long_description:
Heinz for One Baked Beans in Tomato Sauce are perfectly cooked beans in a deliciously rich tomato sauce - what's not to love? Heinz Beanz don't just taste great; they're high in protein, an excellent source of dietary fibre and low in fat too, making them a great meal choice for kids and adults alike. Whether you like your baked beans in a toastie, on a baked potato or as part of an English breakfast, you really can't beat the classic Heinz recipe. This multipack of Heinz for One baked beans in tomato sauce can be enjoyed at any time of the day, as a snack, a meal or a side dish with dinner. While Heinz Beanz are the perfect topping for beans on toast or served with eggs and bacon, you can also incorporate them into casseroles, pasta sauces, pies and Mexican dishes too.
  • Fibre-Packed: Naturally high in dietary fibre and low in fat

  • Protein Powerhouse: Fuel your day with a great source of protein.

  • Ready in Minutes: Easy to heat on the stove or in the microwave

  • Anytime, Any Meal: A great choice for breakfast, lunch or dinner
ingredients: Navy Beans (51%), Tomato Sauce (49%) [Tomatoes (24%), Water, Sugar, Maize Thickener (1422), Salt, Food Acids (260, 330), Flavours]. May Contain: Soy.

name: Spaghetti Extra Cheesy Spaghetti Pasta
description: HEINZ SPAGHETTI EXTRA CHEESY SPAGHETTI PASTA
long_description:
Just when you thought Heinz Spaghetti couldn't get any better, it got cheesier. With extra cheese and a tomato squeezed into every 300g can, Heinz Spaghetti Extra Cheesy is the perfect choice for quick weeknight dinners, big weekend breakfasts and in a tasty toastie for lunch. Fresh Heinz spaghetti mixed with our delicious tomato and cheese sauce, Heinz Spaghetti Extra Cheesy will be a hit for all cheese lovers, big or small. Containing a tomato squeezed into every 300g can, this spaghetti contains 1.5 serves of vegetables per can (One serve of vegetables = 75g. Aim for a variety of vegetables each day.), and can be enjoyed in multiple ways such as in a toastie, with eggs or on a baked potato.
  • Heinz Spaghetti with rich tomato and cheese sauce

  • Extra cheesy

  • Contains 1.5 serves of vegetables per can (One serve of vegetables = 75g. Aim for a variety of vegetables each day.)

  • Easy to heat on the stove or in the microwave

  • No artificial colours or flavours
ingredients: Tomato Sauce (52%) [Tomatoes (48%), Sugar, Cheese Paste (1.3%) (Milk), Salt, Food Acid (330)], Spaghetti (48%) (Water, Wheat Flour).Contains: Milk, Wheat, Gluten.
